If you're a seasoned actor or just starting in the business can we have you attention.

Get noticed right here in Hollywood East Orlando Florida.

 We are needing a few more actors for a 15 minute short Independent filmed right here in Orlando Florida. We are also looking for a few behind the scenes technicians.
   Rehearsal dates are starting soon here in CentralFlorida and Full Sail students are encouraged to participate. All dialog is very short. Don't be shy because this is the time to shine.
 Message me for details! "OPEN CASTING" below are casting for those roles.

Thank you.
Doug

items.text:
Big milestone for New Jersey’s production future. The momentum at Fort Monmouth is a signal that NJ is building real infrastructure—jobs, training, and long-term opportunity for filmmakers and creators.
From Jersey City, we’re ready for the wave.

#NJFilm #NewJerseyFilm #FilmIndustry #FilmProduction #JerseyCity #VirtualProduction #NJCreators #ProductionJobs 

The official closing of Netflix on Fort Monmouth affirms that the birthplace of film is where its future is being built once again.

sharedPost.text:
The official closing of Netflix on Fort Monmouth affirms that the birthplace of film is where its future is being built once again.
 
Fort Monmouth is no longer a dormant site — it will be a place where our production workforce can grow and a symbol of New Jersey’s vibrant economic future.

items.text:
Wenn ein Schauspieler auch mit Musik berührt, bleibt ein Abend ganz anders im Herzen 

Sandra und ich, Christian, haben Florian Thunemann in der Wundertüte in Köln-Sülz live auf der Bühne erlebt, an seiner Gitarre als Begleitung einer Band, und dieser Abend war für uns weit mehr als nur ein schöner Barbesuch. 

Viele kennen Florian Thunemann aus seiner "filmischen Erfahrung" in „SOKO Leipzig“ im ZDF, „Wege zum Glück - Spuren im Sand“ im ZDF sowie „Alles was zählt“ bei RTL und auf RTL+. Umso besonderer war es für uns, ihn an diesem Abend nicht nur als starken Schauspieler wahrzunehmen, sondern auch als Musiker, der mit Gefühl, Ruhe und echter Hingabe spielt. 

Sein Gitarrenspiel hatte Wärme, Tiefe und eine ganz eigene Sprache. Es war nicht nur musikalische Begleitung, sondern ein Ausdruck von Persönlichkeit, Präsenz und künstlerischer Reife. Genau diese Verbindung aus Schauspielkunst und Musik hat uns berührt und diesen Abend für uns so erinnerungswürdig gemacht. 

Auch die Wundertüte selbst hat dazu wunderbar gepasst. Ein Ort mit Charakter, ehrlicher Atmosphäre und einem echten Herz für Kultur. Genau solche Bars sind es, die Live-Momente nicht nur möglich machen, sondern ihnen Seele geben. 

Lieber Florian Thunemann, danke für diesen besonderen Abend. Und auch an die Wundertüte ein herzliches Danke für einen Ort, an dem Kunst, Musik und Begegnung so schön zusammenfinden. 

Kennst Du Florian Thunemann bislang eher aus dem Fernsehen, oder würdest Du ihn auch gern einmal live mit seiner Musik erleben? 

Lass es mich gern im Kommentarfeld wissen ;-) 

Christian Weiße / Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner / Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion  

#FlorianThunemann #WundertüteKöln #AllesWasZählt #LiveMusik #KölnSülz

items.groupTitle: Film- und Musikschaffende, Schauspieler, Musiker, Darsteller, Sänger, Model
items.summary:
Wenn ein Schauspieler auch mit Musik berührt, bleibt ein Abend ganz anders im Herzen 

Sandra und ich, Christian, haben Florian Thunemann in der Wundertüte in Köln-Sülz live auf der Bühne erlebt, an seiner Gitarre als Begleitung einer Band, und dieser Abend war für uns weit mehr als nur ein schöner Barbesuch. 

Viele kennen Florian Thunemann aus seiner "filmischen Erfahrung" in „SOKO Leipzig“ im ZDF, „Wege zum Glück - Spuren im Sand“ im ZDF sowie „Alles was zählt“ bei RTL und auf RTL+. Umso besonderer war es für uns, ihn an diesem Abend nicht nur als starken Schauspieler wahrzunehmen, sondern auch als Musiker, der mit Gefühl, Ruhe und echter Hingabe spielt. 

Sein Gitarrenspiel hatte Wärme, Tiefe und eine ganz eigene Sprache. Es war nicht nur musikalische Begleitung, sondern ein Ausdruck von Persönlichkeit, Präsenz und künstlerischer Reife. Genau diese Verbindung aus Schauspielkunst und Musik hat uns berührt und diesen Abend für uns so erinnerungswürdig gemacht. 

Auch die Wundertüte selbst hat dazu wunderbar gepasst. Ein Ort mit Charakter, ehrlicher Atmosphäre und einem echten Herz für Kultur. Genau solche Bars sind es, die Live-Momente nicht nur möglich machen, sondern ihnen Seele geben. 

Lieber Florian Thunemann, danke für diesen besonderen Abend. Und auch an die Wundertüte ein herzliches Danke für einen Ort, an dem Kunst, Musik und Begegnung so schön zusammenfinden. 

Kennst Du Florian Thunemann bislang eher aus dem Fernsehen, oder würdest Du ihn auch gern einmal live mit seiner Musik erleben? 

Lass es mich gern im Kommentarfeld wissen ;-) 

Christian Weiße / Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner / Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion  

#FlorianThunemann #WundertüteKöln #AllesWasZählt #LiveMusik #KölnSülz

La chanteuse 

Was ich Dir/ Ihnen biete:

- eine fundierte Atmung
- Stütztraining
- Lockerung deines Stimmapparates
- individuelle Stimmübungen
- Stimmsitz
- Erweiterung deiner Gesangsrange
- individuelle Repertoireauswahl
- Texterarbeitung in deutsch / englisch / italienisch / französisch 
- Vorbereitung auf Castings / Auditions
- das Loslassen beim Singen und   Performen
- Üben am jeweiligen Chorrepertoire
- Training für ein selbstbewusstes Auftreten / Ausstrahlung 
- wie bleibe ich sängerisch authentisch 
-wie lerne ich Emotionen in Musik umzusetzen 

Ich freue mich auf genau Dich!

Weitere Informationen unter:
annettekuhngreiner@gmail.com 

Ihre/ Eure 
Annette Kuhn
www.annette-kuhn.de

items.text:
**“MAX” CASTING CALL – SASKIA**

 

We’re looking for YOUNG BRITISH ACTORS to audition for the role of SASKIA in an upcoming short film.

 

To apply, COMPLETE THE “SASKIA” FORM IN OUR BIO and you will be sent sides for a self-tape audition.

 

21 – 30 years old.

Female-presenting.

Any ethnicity.

 

MUST BE BASED IN LONDON OR HAVE SOMEWHERE TO STAY THROUGHOUT PRODUCTION.

 

FILMING: 7th – 14th June, 2026 (subject to change).

 

No previous acting experience required. PAID OPPORTUNITY.

Travel, meal and other expenses will be completely covered in addition.

 

DEADLINE TO APPLY: Wednesday 18th March @ 23.00 pm.

DEADLINE FOR SELF-TAPES: Sunday 22nd March @ 23.00 pm.

 

If you have any questions, please feel free to get in touch at [info@bettymedia.co.uk](mailto:info@bettymedia.co.uk) 

 

We look forward to hearing from you!

 

The Betty Media team.

🎬 LAS VEGAS OPEN CASTING CALL

We’re looking for bold, unforgettable talent for the dark comedy feature THE RISE AND FALL OF THE PIXELS written and directed by KL Martin.

Filming in Las Vegas from late April through early/mid June. This is a paid, non-union production.

If you’re a local Las Vegas actor ready to bring something real, raw, and electric to the screen, we want to see you.

📩 Submit headshot, resume, and reel (if available) to:

pixelscastinglv@gmail.com

⏳ Deadline: March 20, 2026

🎙️ Dreaming of working in Animation and Games as a Voiceover Artist?

Look no further.

Check out our brilliant client Lizzy Byrne, an actively working professional VO artist who is making her mark in the industry. From character performance to dynamic storytelling, Lizzy is a fantastic example of what can be achieved with dedication, the right guidance and belief in your talent.

At PBL Voiceover Coach, we help aspiring and developing voice artists build the skills, confidence and industry awareness needed to break into professional voiceover work — including animation and gaming.

Kochani moi ! 
Mam kolejny plan ! 
Wrzucam info grzecznościowo ❤️Więcej informacji znajdziecie w szczegółach ❤️ 

Agencja STARS poszukuje osób do krótkiej sesji zdjęciowej w klimacie City Break!
TYLKO OSOBY, KTÓRE JESZCZE NIE BRAŁY UDZIAŁU

📅 Termin: 19.03
📍 Lokalizacja: Warszawa – Śródmieście
⏰ Dyspozycyjność: 1h sesja wykonywana w pierwszej połowie dnia- dokładne godziny dostaną osoby wybrane.
(Zdjęcia trwają 30 minut – dokładna godzina zostanie podana po zgłoszeniu dyspozycyjności w podanym dniu).

📷 O projekcie:
Sesja realizowana jest na użytek wewnętrzny klienta (bez publikacji) – w ramach projektu technologicznego mającego na celu odróżnianie zdjęć profesjonalnych od amatorskich.

💰 Stawka: 100 zł netto
Płatność po podpisaniu umowy na planie oraz wykonaniu zdjęć!

👕 Ubiór:
Schludne, nowoczesne stylizacje, kolorowe, jak zdjęcia na insta.
❗ Bez bieli, czerni oraz czapek zasłaniających twarz.

📩 Zgłoszenia:
Wyślij email na: o.peczak@stars-impresariat.pl podając imię nazwisko, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie.

Możesz zgłaszać również znajomych i rodzinę, paczkę , z którą lubisz się bawić 

Do zobaczenia na planie!

items.text:
‼️ CASTING CALL ‼️

My name is Alisiia, I’m a producer based in Warsaw ✨

I’m looking for a male actor / charismatic guy (STUNTMAN) to film TikTok videos 👥

Age: 20-35
Good english
💸Paid
📍Warsaw, Poland 

Type:
-more action-oriented

The guys will participate in various challenges and experiments, both sports-related and comedic 💪

Skills:
-stunt skills or similar experience are preferred
-no fear of heights
-willingness to participate in extreme or physically demanding scenes

Example of a possible scene:
-performing a slam dunk into a basketball hoop from a height (for example, from a helicopter) or taking part in other unusual sports experiments.

If you’re interested, please send me a direct message!📨

items.text:
Hallo zusammen,

für einen globalen Werbespot mit globalen Nutzungsrechten sind wir aktuell auf der Suche nach einer vierköpfigen Familie.

Es handelt sich um einen Werbespot für einen Drohnen-Controller. Der Dreh ist rein visuell und fängt natürliche Familienmomente im Lifestyle-Kontext ein.

Gesucht werden:
• Mama
• Papa
• Junge (8–13 Jahre)
• Mädchen (8–13 Jahre)

Wichtige Voraussetzungen:
• Keine sichtbaren Tattoos
• Keine Piercings

Drehorte: Südbayern und Karwendel (Tyrol)

Drehtage: 
• 2 Drehtage (Outdoor) 
• Anreise am Abend vor dem ersten Drehtag
• Drehschluss am zweiten Drehtag nach Sonnenuntergang
• Drehzeitraum: Zwischen 20.03.-29.03.

Bei Interesse gerne Fotos, Angebot, Alter und Wohnort an: contact@sindynelia.de

Vielen Dank und liebe Grüße
Sindy

🎬 CASTING CALL 

Für unseren Kurzfilm suchen wir eine Darstellerin für die Rolle:

LINA (25–30)
Warmherzig, emotional und authentisch. Lina liebt tief, steht aber innerlich zwischen Hoffnung und Schmerz.

📍 Drehort: Stuttgart
📅 Dreh: 17.–18.04
🎥 Produktion: TT Films
💰 Gage: Keine (Hobbyprojekt), aber Material für dein Showreel & Verpflegung am Set.

📩 Bei Interesse: kurze Vorstellung + 2–3 Fotos senden.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - Kinderrolle (Junge, 6-8 Jahre)**

Liebe filminteressierte Familien,

für unseren Kurzfilm „Death Drive“ (AT) von Studierenden der Filmuniversität Babelsberg und der Freien Universität Berlin suchen wir einen Jungen im Spielalter von 6–8 Jahren für die Hauptrolle.

**Details zum Projekt:**
• Drehzeitraum: Ende April 2026
• Voraussichtliche Drehtage: 18. & 19. April sowie 25. & 26. April 2026
• Insgesamt ca. 4 Drehtage in Berlin/Brandenburg
• Keine schauspielerische Vorerfahrung notwendig

• Keine Gage

**Bewerbung:**
Bitte sendet 2–3 aktuelle, natürliche Fotos (Porträt & Ganzkörper – keine Filter, keine professionellen Fotos nötig) sowie ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo (einfach mit dem Handy aufgenommen) an: [deathdrive.produktion@gmail.com](mailto:deathdrive.produktion@gmail.com)

Bei Anfrage können wir euch gerne mehr Informationen sowie das Drehbuch zukommen lassen. Wir freuen uns sehr über eure Einsendungen und Tipps!

Viele Grüße
Laura

Calling all talent in Windsor! 🇬🇧
 
We’re hosting auditions on March 19 seeking Costume Characters & Hosts for LEGOLAND® Windsor Resort. Swipe for more details.

items.text:
**Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy matki francuskiej dziewczynki ( casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje kobiety **w wieku 30 – 35 lat** do roli matki francuskiej dziewczynki. Kobieta wystąpi w 2 scenach ataku Niemców na budynek cywilny. W jednej scenie postać matki dziewczynki ma dialog po francusku ze swoją córką. Mile widziana osoba **z Gliwic lub okolic, Zabrze czy Katowice.** Szukamy kogoś bez farbowanych włosów, bez malowanych paznokci czy braku tatuaży na twarzy. Zdjęcia próbne planujemy **15.03.26 między 10:30 a 15:00 ( Niedziela )**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
**Szukam modelki  Gliwice/Katowice ( Śląsk )**

 

Szukam pań które nie krępują się własnego ciała i chciałaby mieć ciekawą pamiątkę w postaci klimatycznych zdjęć. Wiem jak bardzo jest ważna akceptacja własnego ciała bo przez to też możemy inaczej funkcjonować. Przez takie zdjęcia można również tego dokonać. Sesja w głównej mierze jest jako taki motywator.

 

Zapraszam do Gliwic do mojego domowego mini studia foto na sesje tematyczne. Finalnie wychodzi  **od 15 do 20 zdjęć.** Do wyboru są 2 opcje tematyczne. Koszt takiej sesji to tylko **150 zł**. Posiadam na wyposażeniu mini studio z kilkoma tłami oraz lampami. Podpisuje również oświadczenie o wykonywanych zdjęciach w konkretny dzień sesji. Mam również duży wybór kostiumów i gadżetów do wykorzystywania:

** **

**Temat 1 – ‘’Kobieta mafii 1930’’**

Postać kobiety osadzona w 1930 roku w roli bogatej kobiety, która trudni się gangsterstwem. Przewidziane są ujęcia m.in. przy stoliku na którym są pieniądze, wino, rewolwer. Tło jest wydrukowane w formie muru, cegieł. Motyw sensualny.

** **

**Temat 2 – ‘’Wampirzyca w baroku 1700’’**

Postać kobiety ubrana najpierw w suknie czarną oraz peleryne z kapturem. Do tego czarna długa peruka oraz czarne paznokcie. W kolejnym etapie sesji motyw sensualny.

** **

**Temat 3 – ‘’Duchy lasu’’**

Postać kobiety ubrana w wianek i w pelerynę z otwartym przodem. W dłoni ma zakrwawiony sierp. Usta czarne oraz paznokcie.

** **

**Temat 4 – ‘’Kleopatra’’**

Postać kobiety z czarna peruką w stylu Kleopatry. W prawej recę trzymac będzie berło Anubisa a w drugiej ręcę księgę umarłych. Na biodrach będzie mieć jedynie klasyczne odzienie z 2 części. Na klatce piersiowej założony będzie napierśnik złoty.

** **

**Temat 5 – ‘’Odważna Piratka ‘’**

Postać kobiety ubrana w strój piracki: kamizelka, koszula, kapelusz, spodnie i kapelusz a do tego rekwizyty pistolet czy kufel piwa.

 

**Temat 6 – ‘’Lara Croft ‘’**

Postać kobiety wzorowanej z tytułowej gry Tomb Rider Lary Croft.  Kobiete będzie przebywać w swojej bazie i badać nowe znaleziska pod lupą.

 

** **

**Zapraszam na stronę**

** **

**Facebook Łukasz Magiera – Fotografia**

www.instagram.com/lukasz.magiera.official

Więcej informacji na Priv

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Kobieta mafii 1930 LaraCroft ara Croft Duchy Duchylasu lasu Piratka Wampirzyca'

items.text:
˚₊✩‧₊ CASTING CALL ˚₊✩‧₊
We are still looking to cast our main love interest- Freddie! (Manchester based)

“Pufferfish” tells the story of a young woman with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) navigating the dating world. She goes on several dates until she finally meets Freddie; who she thinks is the one.

This is an unpaid project but travel and catering will be provided! Shooting will be in Mid - April.

If you are interested please reach out via DM on our instagram @pufferfish.short or email us at pufferfish.short@gmail.com 

We can’t wait to hear from you! ˚₊✩‧₊

From 4Deuce Media and Daniel Glenn‑Barbour comes a new podcast built on reflection, not trends.

We’re revisiting ten years of Daniel’s work — the moments you never saw, the challenges we pushed through, and the truth of how every project got made.

#indiefilm #filmmaker #DirectorLife #screenwriting #FilmProduction #behindthescenes #setlife #filmcommunity #cinematography #filmcrew #onset

Would you like to earn an extra income? Come and join me in my UW journey!

Since I joined it has massively changed my life for the better

-Customer by bundling your household bills into one monthly payment, saving you money in the process.

-Partner you can earn an extra income by helping customers join UW and earn yourself free energy.

-Connector if you run a small business this is for you, referring people to your UW partner and earning an extra income yourself.

Would you like more information please send me a message with your area of interest or comment below.

I am really looking forward to helping more people

items.text:
“One can’t just shoot anybody on the street!”

 

Sound familiar from recent events in America?

 

It’s actually a line from *Charlie *and *Striptease *a double-bill of hilarious political comedies written in the Soviet era by award-winning Polish writer Slawomir Mrozek.

 

I’m delighted to share that DRH Arts is presenting these hilarious but thought-provoking plays (in English translation) at The Golden Goose Theatre in Camberwell from 21 April to 9 May. The theatre is just down the road from Oval.  

 

The plays, with four actors, expose the world of authoritarian government, secret police, informers and surveillance, through fast-moving comedy and satire. 

 

Full details can be found in the leaflet attached here and on the venue website:

 

[https://www.goldengoosetheatre.co.uk/whatson/charlie-and-striptease](https://www.goldengoosetheatre.co.uk/whatson/charlie-and-striptease) 

 

Follow us on Instagram @drh.arts for cast info, production updates and news.

items.text:
Casting Call for the https://wssf.com/ 72hr Film Maker Showdown. **Title:**72 film fest submission.

**Format:** Short Film

**Union:** Non-Union

**Location:** Whistler, BC 

**Production:** Created for the [Whistler Ski and Snowboard Festival](chatgpt://generic-entity?number=0) 72-Hour Filmmaker Showdown

**Shoot Dates:** March 27–28, 2026

**Compensation:** Volunteer / Copy & Credit

Transportation from Vancouver will be provided Friday and Saturday if needed.

**Production Note**

This project is being produced as part of a **72-hour film competition** and will be created on an accelerated schedule.

Our goal is to keep the shoot **organized, collaborative, and enjoyable**. While the timeline is tight, this will not be a "run-and-gun chaosproduction". The focus is on having fun, working together creatively, and ensuring everyone walks away with **a strong piece for their reel**, regardless of the competition’s final outcome.

Our team **won this event many years ago**, and we’re excited to return for the **30th anniversary** of the WSSF. 

*This note will be updated as roles are filled.*

⸻

**ROLES**

**DYLAN — LEAD**

Male, **25–55** ( flexible) 

Confident, intense, and charismatic. Dylan carries himself like someone completely certain of his place in the world and speaks with unwavering conviction.Charismatic, stubborn, and relentlessly self-assured.The character should be played with total sincerity — the humour comes from how seriously Dylan takes himself.Actor should be comfortable with subtle physical performance and strong deadpan delivery.

⸻

**JOSEPH  — SUPPORTING**

Male, **45–70** (flexible)

An eccentric intellectual type with a calm, thoughtful presence. Joseph speaks slowly and deliberately, often with philosophical weight behind his words.Dry, deadpan delivery and strong character instincts preferred.

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS**

Please submit:

• Headshot

• Resume

• Demo reel (if available)

Selected actors will be contacted with short audition sides for a self-tape. Feel free to reach out via email with any questions.

**Subject Line:**

[ROLE NAME] – [ACTOR NAME]

**Send submissions to:**

72hourfilm2026@gmail.com

**Submission Deadline:**

March 17th

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of mountain and road

topComments.text: If you need a female actress!
Thanks to everyone for the submissions so far, looking foreward to going them this weekend!

items.text:
CASTING DO LETNIEJ REKLAMY LODÓW – ZGŁOŚ SIĘ! 🍦

Szukamy charakterystycznych, naturalnych i różnorodnych osób w wieku 20–50 lat do udziału w letniej reklamie popularnych lodów. Jeśli masz ciekawą energię, lubisz dobrą zabawę przed kamerą i chcesz przeżyć fajną przygodę na planie – to ogłoszenie jest dla Ciebie!

💰 Stawki: 2500 – 4500 zł brutto z prowizją Agencji
📅 Plan zdjęciowy: 1–2 dni
⏰ Termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń: sobota 14.03 do godz. 13:00

👥 Kogo szukamy?

Role drugoplanowe

3 znajomych przy Żabce (20–30 lat) – pozytywna ekipa w stylu gen-z, różniąca się wyglądem i stylem.

Osoba przy „gibańcu” (23–45 lat) – mężczyzna z komediowym vibe’em, poczuciem rytmu i umiejętnościami tanecznymi.

Kobieta w ogrodzie (30–40 lat) – promienista, naturalna, z ciepłą energią.

Role epizodyczne

Paź (25–55 lat) – bardzo charakterystyczny mężczyzna o wyjątkowym wyglądzie.

Zapaśnik (20–50 lat) – potężna sylwetka, kulturysta lub ktoś o imponującym wzroście.

5 „gibających się ludzi” (23–45 lat) – kobiety i mężczyźni z dobrą koordynacją ruchową, mile widziane umiejętności taneczne lub gimnastyczne.

📩 Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać:

• imię i nazwisko
• wiek
• wzrost
• zdjęcie portretowe
• zdjęcie sylwetki

🎥 Wizytówkę wideo, w której:

przedstawisz się (imię, wiek, wzrost),

opowiesz o swoich zainteresowaniach,

na końcu pokażesz dłonie z obu stron oraz oba profile twarzy.

🎥 Zadania castingowe

💃 Role: Osoba przy gibańcu / Gibający się ludzie
Nagraj krótki taniec do muzyki A$AP Rocky inspirowany ruchami „gibańców” – tych długich dmuchanych postaci, które falują na wietrze przy festynach i reklamach.

🍦 Role: Znajomi przy Żabce / Kobieta w ogrodzie / Paź / Zapaśnik 
Nagraj krótkie wideo, na którym jesz swojego ulubionego loda (najlepiej Kaktusa). Pokaż emocje, dłonie, usta i oczy:
• Paź – komediowo
• Zapaśnik – groźnie lub humorystycznie
• Pozostałe role – wesoło i lekko

Pamiętajcie, że filmiki zamieszczamy na YouTube w wersji niepublicznej / każda osoba mająca link 🙂

Jak się zgłosić?

Wyślij zgłoszenie:
📧 mailowo: casting@unagimedia.pl
➡️ w tytule maila wpisz: „002”

lub przez formularz:
📝 https://forms.gle/67TFqwfgnQZpHktaA

Masz ciekawą energię i chcesz pojawić się w letniej kampanii reklamowej?✨ 
Nie zwlekaj! Wyślij zgłoszenie i spróbuj swoich sił przed kamerą! 🍦🌞

P.S. Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami / przekażemy szczegóły

items.text:
OGŁOSZENIE – POSZUKIWANE PARY DO PROGRAMU TELEWIZYJNEGO „GRY MAŁŻEŃSKIE”
Stacja Polsat Cafe poszukuje par (małżeństw lub partnerów) do udziału w nowym, lekkim i rozrywkowym programie telewizyjnym „Gry Małżeńskie”.

To format pełen humoru, emocji i dobrej zabawy, w którym relacje między partnerami zostają wystawione na ciekawą próbę. W programie pojawia się bohaterka wcielająca się w rolę detektywa, która rozmawia z trzema mężczyznami i próbuje odgadnąć, który z nich jest prawdziwym singlem. Dwóch z nich jest w związkach, a jeden jest faktycznie wolny.

Jeśli detektywka uzna, że Twój partner jest prawdziwym singlem, Wasza para wygrywa nagrodę główną w wysokości 3000 zł.

Dodatkowo każda para otrzymuje 1200 zł wynagrodzenia za udział w programie.

Informacje organizacyjne:

 • nagrania odbywają się w weekendy (piątek, sobota lub niedziela),

 • udział obejmuje 2 dni zdjęciowe,

 • zwracamy koszty dojazdu,

 • zapewniamy nocleg w hotelu,

 • pracuje mała ekipa, a na planie panuje luźna i przyjazna atmosfera,

 • format ma charakter zabawy i rozrywki- bez scenariusza.

Jeśli macie dystans do siebie, poczucie humoru i chcecie przeżyć ciekawą przygodę telewizyjną- to program dla Was!

Zapraszamy pary, które chcą przeżyć coś nowego, dobrze się bawić i powalczyć o nagrodę. 🎬

items.text:
**Szukam modelki  Gliwice/Katowice ( Śląsk )**

 

Szukam pań które nie krępują się własnego ciała i chciałaby mieć ciekawą pamiątkę w postaci klimatycznych zdjęć. Wiem jak bardzo jest ważna akceptacja własnego ciała bo przez to też możemy inaczej funkcjonować. Przez takie zdjęcia można również tego dokonać. Sesja w głównej mierze jest jako taki motywator.

 

Zapraszam do Gliwic do mojego domowego mini studia foto na sesje tematyczne. Finalnie wychodzi  **od 15 do 20 zdjęć.** Do wyboru są 2 opcje tematyczne. Koszt takiej sesji to tylko **150 zł**. Posiadam na wyposażeniu mini studio z kilkoma tłami oraz lampami. Podpisuje również oświadczenie o wykonywanych zdjęciach w konkretny dzień sesji. Mam również duży wybór kostiumów i gadżetów do wykorzystywania:

** **

**Temat 1 – ‘’Kobieta mafii 1930’’**

Postać kobiety osadzona w 1930 roku w roli bogatej kobiety, która trudni się gangsterstwem. Przewidziane są ujęcia m.in. przy stoliku na którym są pieniądze, wino, rewolwer. Tło jest wydrukowane w formie muru, cegieł. Motyw sensualny.

** **

**Temat 2 – ‘’Wampirzyca w baroku 1700’’**

Postać kobiety ubrana najpierw w suknie czarną oraz peleryne z kapturem. Do tego czarna długa peruka oraz czarne paznokcie. W kolejnym etapie sesji motyw sensualny.

** **

**Temat 3 – ‘’Duchy lasu’’**

Postać kobiety ubrana w wianek i w pelerynę z otwartym przodem. W dłoni ma zakrwawiony sierp. Usta czarne oraz paznokcie.

** **

**Temat 4 – ‘’Kleopatra’’**

Postać kobiety z czarna peruką w stylu Kleopatry. W prawej recę trzymac będzie berło Anubisa a w drugiej ręcę księgę umarłych. Na biodrach będzie mieć jedynie klasyczne odzienie z 2 części. Na klatce piersiowej założony będzie napierśnik złoty.

** **

**Temat 5 – ‘’Odważna Piratka ‘’**

Postać kobiety ubrana w strój piracki: kamizelka, koszula, kapelusz, spodnie i kapelusz a do tego rekwizyty pistolet czy kufel piwa.

 

**Temat 6 – ‘’Lara Croft ‘’**

Postać kobiety wzorowanej z tytułowej gry Tomb Rider Lary Croft.  Kobiete będzie przebywać w swojej bazie i badać nowe znaleziska pod lupą.

 

** **

**Zapraszam na stronę**

** **

**Facebook Łukasz Magiera – Fotografia**

www.instagram.com/lukasz.magiera.official

Więcej informacji na Priv

items.title: 🚨 CASTING ALERT! CASTING ALERT! 🚨

items.text:
Casting a short student film following 24 year old Mikey who becomes consumed by the growing anxiety that he is running out of time. While everyone around him seem to be moving ahead in life. After receiving a watch he believes is bad luck, it's constant ticking reflects his fear and turns his routines into a race he cant escape.

Through the contrast of his carefree best friend. Skylar he begins to question the pressure he puts on himself. When the watch stops, he realises his fear of falling behind was more limiting that time itself.

This is a visually driven, deeply relatable short film exploring the "quarter-life crisis," the weight of modern expectations, and learning how to finally breathe. We are looking for talented, passionate actors to bring this psychological and emotional journey to life.

Please note: As this is a student production, it is an unpaid role. However, it is a fantastic opportunity to collaborate with an ambitious crew in Liverpool

IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS PLEASE MESSAGE ME OR IF YOU WANT MORE INFORMATION ABOUT THE PROJECT PLEASE CHECK OUR MANDY POST 

https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3114924/catching-time/

items.text:
Hello everyone! I'm currently working for ITV and we are looking for fun, confident and quick-thinking pairs to take part in 'Chase Around the World' - a brand new show from the makers of The Chase which takes the popular game show on the road. 

If you and a partner, relative, friend or colleague have a knack for general knowledge and would like a unique experience solving puzzles on the go to be in with the chance of winning a HUGE cash prize… we want to hear from you!

items.text:
We are casting a series of fast-paced, 30-second (UNPAID) STUDENT PROJECT Specsaver adverts paying homage to the legendary, culturally iconic "Should've gone to..." advertising campaign. This project is all about visual humour, oblivious confidence, and impeccable comedic timing.

We are looking for actors who excel at deadpan delivery and physical comedy. If you can play a character who is hilariously, confidently, and completely wrong about their surroundings, we want to see you!

We will cover meals and drinks as well as travel (Within the merseyside area)

filmed on high quality professional equipment as well as a professional environment and crew

This project will provide you with:
-Showreel footage material
-On-screen credits
-acting experience with a professionally run student production

IF INTERESTED MESSAGE ME PRIVATELY OR APPLY ON OUR MANDY 

https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3113999/specsaver-ads/

items.text:
TIL TV-SERIEN DE BEDSTE FAMILIER - HANDEST JYLLAND 

Vi får mange henvendelser, men mangler lige de sidste på plads, der er et match med hår og tøjstr. Se nedenfor.

5 MANDLIGE statistroller som funktionær, alder ca. 25 - 50 år
1 KVINDELIG statistrolle som servitrice/kollega til birolle, 
alder ca. 20-30 år

Du skal kunne komme til Handest mandag 16/3 kl. 9.00 - ca. kl. 11 til en kostume/sminkeprøve, så kostume og hår er klar til optagelse.

Du skal senere på dagen kunne være med til optagelse 
16/3 ca. 15 - 02 og igen 17/3 ca. kl. 11 - 22.30 i en togvogn både holdende og kørende.

Der er i alt 1800 kr. honorar for 
2 optagelsesdage + 1 sminke/kostumeprøve.
Der er forplejning tilpasset tidsrum på optagelsesdage.
Udgifter til f.eks. transport refunderes ikke.
Evt. overnatninger refunderes ikke.

Følgende krav til krop og udseende pga. tilgængelige kostumer og tidsperioden:

NB! Danmark var ikke så beriget med forskellige nationaliteter, så du skal ligne en med dansk/nordeuropæisk herkomst.

MÆND:
max højde 186, tøjstr. S-M, ingen synlige tatoveringer med skjorte på inkl. håndled eller piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet med mindre gråt, korthåret men nok længde til at kunne lave sideskilning med mindre naturlig skaldet, ingen kronraget eller karseklippet, ingen skæg på optagelsesdage. Du skal kunne se uden briller, da dine egne vil blive for moderne.

KVINDE:
max højde 175, tøjstr. XS-S (der er kun 1 kostume muligt), ingen synlige tatoveringer inkl. arm, håndled, eyeliner og øjenbryn, ingen piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet, korthåret til max længde skuldre med mindre du vil lade dig klippe til dette, ingen synligt falske negle eller øjenvipper, ingen hårextensions.
Du skal kunne se uden briller da dine egne vil blive for moderne.

Vi skal kende følgende for at komme i betragtning, som skal sendes i en mail til ajlystbaek@hotmail.com

Navn, alder, mobilnummer, højde, tøjstr., skostr., mål: hoved-hals-bryst-talje-hofte og inseam/outseam.
Der skal være to helt nye billeder: vellignende billede i helfigur samt en selfie, hvor hår og ansigt ses tydeligt.

items.text:
SKUESPILLERE SØGES TIL KORTFILM I VEJLE 🎥
Vi søger to unge skuespillere til en kortfilm, der skal optages i Vejle.
Roller vi søger:
 Ung mand  – alder 18–20 år
 Ung kvinde  – alder 18–20 år
Vi ser gerne, at du har lidt skuespilerfaring, men det vigtigste er, at du har lyst til at være med i et kreativt filmprojekt.
Optagelser:
 📍Vejle
 📆Dato oplyses ved henvendelse
Praktisk info:
Projektet er ulønnet, men der vil være mad og snacks på settet, og du får en fed oplevelse med filmproduktion samt mulighed for at udvide dit netværk.
Interesseret?
Send en besked med:
• Navn
• Alder
• Et billede af dig selv
• Eventuel skuespilerfaring
Vi glæder os til at høre fra jer! 🎬

items.text:
🎭 LAST MINUTE – URGENT CASTING CALL
Read All Information Before Applying

[PROJECT DESCRIPTION]

A bold new theatre stage production currently in development that will later transition into a Drama Series streaming on major Streaming Television platforms.

What it's About? 

A gritty, fast-paced contemporary thriller exploring the realities of modern life. The story dives deep into powerful human emotions including greed, envy, hatred, love, betrayal, and the pursuit of peace, delivering an intense and emotionally charged narrative designed for both stage and screen.

Each character is inspired by raw, everyday realities, bringing authenticity and depth to the performance.

Creative Tone References:

Projects with a similar grounded tone include films such as Ill Manors, City of Lights, Fish Tank, Everywhere & Nowhere, and Sugarush.

This project is being developed with a clear pathway towards an on-screen drama series aimed at major platforms including:

Netflix, Amazon Studios, Apple TV+, A24, Sky Studios, Facebook Watch, HBO, Hulu, Film4, Paramount+, Pluto TV, Plex, Mubi and ITV Studios.

🎬 ROLE |

Gender: Female

Age Range: 20's to 30's

White/Caucasian

Personality: Wild, free-spirited, bubbly, energetic City Girl

A vibrant young woman navigating the emotional chaos of city life

This role requires someone comfortable with improvisational acting and natural emotional expressions.

You aren't required to learn a script. Cast will be provided with:

A Character Backstory

A short Monologue to help you begin the performance

Improvisation guidance will be given by the Director during rehearsals

🎭 PERFORMANCE DETAILS |

Theatre Stage Performance Date:

📅 23rd March 2026

⏰ 5:00 PM

📍 UK, London

🎬 REHEARSAL DETAILS |

Rehearsals will take place in group sessions with the Director and Acting Coach.

📅 17th March 2026 – 6:30 PM

📅 22nd March 2026 – 6:30 PM

⏱ Duration: Approx. 30-40 minutes each session

📍 Camden Studio 

Further production development and rehearsal sessions may continue March–September 2026.

💰 COMPENSATION |

This production begins as a development stage play, forming the foundation for a television series adaptation.

Full production budgets and funding will be secured once the on-screen series phase moves forward onto the next stage.

This is an opportunity to join a project Early and Grow with it.

Patience and long-term vision are essential.

🌟 WHO SHOULD APPLY?

We are looking for someone who is:

Based in UK, London (Strictly ONLY)

Reliable and serious about acting

Available for the performance and rehearsals

Comfortable performing with improvisation

Open to training and development

Experience is welcome but not required.

Applicants who get selected will receive ongoing coaching, training, and mentorship to help develop them into a working professional acting brand.

📩 HOW TO APPLY?

Send The Following via Inbox OR E-Mail:

- Full Name

- Age

- Location

- Headshot and Portfolio If You Own One

- Contact Number 

- Social Media Handles (if any)

Short Introduction About Yourself Why You Want to Join As The Cast

Acting Experience (if any)

Applications will be reviewed immediately due to urgent casting requirements.

⚠️ Serious applicants Only. Availability for the dates listed is essential.

You will be sent credentials of the company and the services we provide of those who apply.

E-Mail Address: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com
items.groupTitle: Casting Calls & Acting Auditions in London / UK

📅 17th March 2026 – 6:30 PM

📅 22nd March 2026 – 6:30 PM

⏱ Duration: Approx. 30-40 minutes each session

📍 Camden Studio 

Further production development and rehearsal sessions may continue March–September 2026.

💰 COMPENSATION |

This production begins as a development stage play, forming the foundation for a television series adaptation.

Full production budgets and funding will be secured once the on-screen series phase moves forward onto the next stage.

This is an opportunity to join a project Early and Grow with it.

Patience and long-term vision are essential.

🌟 WHO SHOULD APPLY?

We are looking for someone who is:

Based in UK, London (Strictly ONLY)

Reliable and serious about acting

Available for the performance and rehearsals

Comfortable performing with improvisation

Open to training and development

Experience is welcome but not required.

Applicants who get selected will receive ongoing coaching, training, and mentorship to help develop them into a working professional acting brand.

📩 HOW TO APPLY?

Send The Following via Inbox OR E-Mail:

- Full Name

- Age

- Location

- Headshot and Portfolio If You Own One

- Contact Number 

- Social Media Handles (if any)

Short Introduction About Yourself Why You Want to Join As The Cast

Acting Experience (if any)

Applications will be reviewed immediately due to urgent casting requirements.

⚠️ Serious applicants Only. Availability for the dates listed is essential.

You will be sent credentials of the company and the services we provide of those who apply.

E-Mail Address: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

🎭 LAST MINUTE – URGENT CASTING CALL
Read All Information Before Applying

[PROJECT DESCRIPTION]

A bold new theatre stage production currently in development that will later transition into a Drama Series streaming on major Streaming Television platforms.

What it's About? 

A gritty, fast-paced contemporary thriller exploring the realities of modern life. The story dives deep into powerful human emotions including greed, envy, hatred, love, betrayal, and the pursuit of peace, delivering an intense and emotionally charged narrative designed for both stage and screen.

Each character is inspired by raw, everyday realities, bringing authenticity and depth to the performance.

Creative Tone References:

Projects with a similar grounded tone include films such as Ill Manors, City of Lights, Fish Tank, Everywhere & Nowhere, and Sugarush.

This project is being developed with a clear pathway towards an on-screen drama series aimed at major platforms including:

Netflix, Amazon Studios, Apple TV+, A24, Sky Studios, Facebook Watch, HBO, Hulu, Film4, Paramount+, Pluto TV, Plex, Mubi and ITV Studios.

🎬 ROLE |

Gender: Female

Age Range: 20's to 30's

White/Caucasian

Personality: Wild, free-spirited, bubbly, energetic City Girl

A vibrant young woman navigating the emotional chaos of city life

This role requires someone comfortable with improvisational acting and natural emotional expressions.

You aren't required to learn a script. Cast will be provided with:

A Character Backstory

A short Monologue to help you begin the performance

Improvisation guidance will be given by the Director during rehearsals

items.text:
✨ Client Spotlight | The Power of Voice in Animation & Games ✨
There is something truly otherworldly about Corbett Barklie’s voice — an ethereal quality that carries emotion, story, and soul. A voice shaped by a life deeply lived in the arts, and one that feels perfectly at home in the worlds of animation, games, and immersive storytelling.

Corbett isn’t just a brilliant voice artist and actor — she is a storyteller whose performances are informed by decades of creative leadership, collaboration, and human connection. In animation and gaming, where truth, imagination, and emotional depth matter most, lived experience is everything — and Corbett brings it in abundance.

With an extensive career across the arts in the USA and Northern Ireland, Corbett blends warmth, intelligence, and quiet power with absolute professionalism on mic. She connects instinctively with audiences, delivering performances that feel grounded, expansive, and unmistakably real.

Her influence behind the scenes is just as impressive:

Founder and Director of Loretta Theatre, Executive Director of ARTS Inc., Deputy Director of Development at Center Theatre Group, consultant and assessor for the NEA, Adjunct Professor at USC School of Theatre, and a champion of bold, unexpected collaborations through her work as a producer and arts consultant.

This is proof that it’s never too late to pivot, never too late to step into a new, vital skillset — and never too late to find your voice in animation, games, and beyond.

🎙️ Ready to elevate your voiceover work?

Book one-to-one coaching with us at pblvoiceover.com, DM us, or get in touch via the website.

Recalibrate. Refocus. Unlock your full creative Voiceover power.

items.text:
Audition Notice
“Scrooge! (Abbreviated Version)” 

Book, Music and Lyrics by Leslie Bricusse

From A Christmas Carol by Charles Dickens

A one-hour adaptation of the crowd-pleasing holiday musical!

In 1970, renowned writer/composer/lyricist Leslie Bricusse adapted the classic Charles Dickens tale A Christmas Carol into the hit screen musical Scrooge! 

A charming stage musical, Scrooge! 

Lyons Community Theatre

Auditions: Will be held at Planet Bluegrass Lab Building(Directions), on Friday, Oct 3rd, 5-7pm; Sunday, Oct 5th,  1-3pm and Monday, Oct 6th, 5-7pm  (If none of these days or times work for you, please contact georgi.pollard@gmail.com by Sunday, Oct 5th @12pm

Performance dates:

Friday, December 12th, 2025 @7pm 

Saturday, December 13th, 2025 @2pm & 7pm

Sunday, December 14th, 2025 @2pm 

@Planet Bluegrass Wildflower Pavillion 

All auditioners  will be asked to sing 16 measures from the musical or a verse from a familiar holiday song.

We will dance a few moves and those wanting a speaking role will read from the script. Everyone is encouraged to show off your English accent!  Although not necessary, you are welcome to bring a prepared song to share.  We will have an accompanist.

Roles are Non-Union | Unpaid

LCT encourages actors of all races, ethnicities, genders, ages, and abilities all ages to audition, welcoming performers from all backgrounds.

Performers may come on any one of the days or you may sign up using the Signup Genius link

Link to Sign up for an Audition Slot:

SIGN UP LINK

https://www.signupgenius.com/go/70A0A4BA4A723ABFE3-58313489-scrooge#/

Hi! We’re currently casting for an upcoming YouTube Imposter Series,to take part in a conversation while trying to identify the “imposter” in the group.

We’re reaching out to see if any of your members would be interested in taking part. It’s a fun, conversation-based video about acting, and a great chance for participants to showcase their personalities and gain exposure.

If anyone from your society is interested, they can sign up here. We’d also really appreciate it if you could share it with your members:  
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf9WkezvlEdc-p2U2jttABpEtWYUi_mf-FVpsSVxAFGTFfcEQ/viewform?fbzx=-4212969923431272085&fbclid=PAVERFWAQinPJleHRuA2FlbQIxMABzcnRjBmFwcF9pZA8xMjQwMjQ1NzQyODc0MTQAAaeX7VhTSGudwM93dbFEKnHoGjAwSkxFAxKmcMxGL9VlQrk34_FbF_CZ_0hnrA_aem_9txVOlNPY4qFp6-yAxN2hw

items.text:
# JOIN OUR VOICE ACTING PODCAST

We are voice actors who improv roleplay as characters going on adventures. Practice new voices! Go on quests! Face challenges! Solve mysteries! It's fun, and every episode we record also doubles as voice samples for your demo tape. We can send snippets demonstrating our character voices to anyone we'd like to hear it. Our gaming group plays a variety of tabletop roleplaying games and publishes the audio as a podcast. Tabletop roleplaying games add dice rolling to improv, giving us voice actors a way to simulate exploring an adventure. Would you enjoy acting as your character, joking around with friends, while playing games that double as demo reel recordings? Join us.
# System played:

We get to learn and play a different tabletop roleplaying game (ttrpg) system each session. There’s no financial burden to you. The systems are either free to everyone or we were sent a promotional copy from its creator. Because we record and publish the audio of our game sessions, indie game developers get an actual play episode to show their game being actually played. Anyone can listen to and hear an example of their system in action. Actual play episodes help more people see how a game is played, and maybe try it themselves. It's why creators send us their rules for free. That's why we’re a podcast. There isn't any money involved. We just do this for fun.

# When we play:

Weekends. Flexible times. Both European and American time zones. Joining us doesn't commit you to every weekend. Instead, we pick games we want to try and sign up for those calendar spots. Members can see who's playing and what ttrpg and pick which sessions they sign up for.

# How long we play / what it’s like:

Our members sit at their microphones for four hours talking their way through an adventure using their words and laughter to entertain each other. The GM says out loud how far away targets are instead of us all looking at combat maps on a screen. Each player sketches or constructs their own battle map on their desk in front of them, using their own minis. So you'll be able to use your minis every game you play. The recordings are high quality, and we air the audio as a podcast. Don’t worry, we don’t publish our names or faces.

# Oneshot or campaign:

Both. Like a oneshot, each individual episode opens with a beginning to its plot, and the exploration of its story ends after four hours. Like a traditional campaign, we repeatedly meet familiar non player characters (NPCs), facing challenges and experiencing long term character growth. Our members make one character for the yearlong campaign and adapt our same character to each ttrpg rule system. The characters are roleplayed so they can’t tell their players are rolling different dice each week. For them, it’s one continuous campaign. Characters are low power level in January, grow to epic max fighting strength by December, then retire.

# Game Mastering (GMing):

We rotate so that everyone is invited to be a player and a game master if they want. The GM gets to pick which ttrpg we play that weekend. If you find a fun ttrpg you want to try, you can sign up as the GM and be confident that there will be players excited to play with you. If you prefer to be a player every time that’s cool, too. Our members don't have to GM ever if they want a break from it. Getting to pick how often you GM really helps relieve burnout. GM as often as makes you happy.

# You can vibe check past games:

We're on itunes, spotify, youtube, and all the podcast apps. Our cast rotates. Skip around and listen to snippets from a few episodes to see which of our members you want to play with first. The episodes aren't all great, but we have fun together. This isn't a job. It's a hobby, a way to relax and laugh meeting new people who slowly over time become lifelong friends. It's okay to miss games; you aren’t expected to be present for every session. The opt-in format naturally minimizes table trouble because you can see who’s signed up to GM and play in a game before you join it, and can pick dates that have people you’re looking forward to playing with.

# Joining:

To join, email us at Firebreathing Kittens Podcast at gmail dot com telling us about your equipment. To make sure everyone’s voice sounds good, we use microphones that capture 24 bit audio. Don’t worry if you’re not sure what 24 bit audio means. Our equipment guide (Firebreathing Kittens Podcast dot com) explains what all the microphone words mean and lists affordable options, including mics under fifty bucks. We’ll help show you how to get set up so you can focus on playing. Firebreathing Kittens Podcast dot com also answers frequently asked questions about our format. Beginners welcome. Minimum age 21 years old. No experience necessary. We will guide you through character creation and train you how to record great audio.

items.groupTitle: Casting Connect UK (Actors, Filmmakers, Casting Directors)
items.summary:
# JOIN OUR VOICE ACTING PODCAST

We are voice actors who improv roleplay as characters going on adventures. Practice new voices! Go on quests! Face challenges! Solve mysteries! It's fun, and every episode we record also doubles as voice samples for your demo tape. We can send snippets demonstrating our character voices to anyone we'd like to hear it. Our gaming group plays a variety of tabletop roleplaying games and publishes the audio as a podcast. Tabletop roleplaying games add dice rolling to improv, giving us voice actors a way to simulate exploring an adventure. Would you enjoy acting as your character, joking around with friends, while playing games that double as demo reel recordings? Join us.
# System played:

We get to learn and play a different tabletop roleplaying game (ttrpg) system each session. There’s no financial burden to you. The systems are either free to everyone or we were sent a promotional copy from its creator. Because we record and publish the audio of our game sessions, indie game developers get an actual play episode to show their game being actually played. Anyone can listen to and hear an example of their system in action. Actual play episodes help more people see how a game is played, and maybe try it themselves. It's why creators send us their rules for free. That's why we’re a podcast. There isn't any money involved. We just do this for fun.

# When we play:

Weekends. Flexible times. Both European and American time zones. Joining us doesn't commit you to every weekend. Instead, we pick games we want to try and sign up for those calendar spots. Members can see who's playing and what ttrpg and pick which sessions they sign up for.

# How long we play / what it’s like:

Our members sit at their microphones for four hours talking their way through an adventure using their words and laughter to entertain each other. The GM says out loud how far away targets are instead of us all looking at combat maps on a screen. Each player sketches or constructs their own battle map on their desk in front of them, using their own minis. So you'll be able to use your minis every game you play. The recordings are high quality, and we air the audio as a podcast. Don’t worry, we don’t publish our names or faces.

# Oneshot or campaign:

Both. Like a oneshot, each individual episode opens with a beginning to its plot, and the exploration of its story ends after four hours. Like a traditional campaign, we repeatedly meet familiar non player characters (NPCs), facing challenges and experiencing long term character growth. Our members make one character for the yearlong campaign and adapt our same character to each ttrpg rule system. The characters are roleplayed so they can’t tell their players are rolling different dice each week. For them, it’s one continuous campaign. Characters are low power level in January, grow to epic max fighting strength by December, then retire.

# Game Mastering (GMing):

We rotate so that everyone is invited to be a player and a game master if they want. The GM gets to pick which ttrpg we play that weekend. If you find a fun ttrpg you want to try, you can sign up as the GM and be confident that there will be players excited to play with you. If you prefer to be a player every time that’s cool, too. Our members don't have to GM ever if they want a break from it. Getting to pick how often you GM really helps relieve burnout. GM as often as makes you happy.

# You can vibe check past games:

We're on itunes, spotify, youtube, and all the podcast apps. Our cast rotates. Skip around and listen to snippets from a few episodes to see which of our members you want to play with first. The episodes aren't all great, but we have fun together. This isn't a job. It's a hobby, a way to relax and laugh meeting new people who slowly over time become lifelong friends. It's okay to miss games; you aren’t expected to be present for every session. The opt-in format naturally minimizes table trouble because you can see who’s signed up to GM and play in a game before you join it, and can pick dates that have people you’re looking forward to playing with.

# Joining:

To join, email us at Firebreathing Kittens Podcast at gmail dot com telling us about your equipment. To make sure everyone’s voice sounds good, we use microphones that capture 24 bit audio. Don’t worry if you’re not sure what 24 bit audio means. Our equipment guide (Firebreathing Kittens Podcast dot com) explains what all the microphone words mean and lists affordable options, including mics under fifty bucks. We’ll help show you how to get set up so you can focus on playing. Firebreathing Kittens Podcast dot com also answers frequently asked questions about our format. Beginners welcome. Minimum age 21 years old. No experience necessary. We will guide you through character creation and train you how to record great audio.

“MAX” CASTING CALL

 

We’re looking for YOUNG BRITISH ACTORS to audition for the role of MAX in an upcoming short film.

 

To apply, COMPLETE THE FORM IN OUR BIO and you will be sent sides for a self-tape audition.

 

18 – 30 years old.

Male-presenting.

Any ethnicity.

 

MUST BE BASED IN LONDON OR HAVE SOMEWHERE TO STAY THROUGHOUT PRODUCTION.

 

FILMING: 7th – 14th June, 2026 (subject to change).

 

We’re especially interested in hearing from males with lean builds, under 6’0.

 

No previous acting experience required. PAID OPPORTUNITY.

Travel, meal and other expenses will be completely covered in addition.

 

DEADLINE TO APPLY: Monday 16th March @ 23.00 pm.

DEADLINE FOR SELF-TAPES: Friday 20th March @ 23.00 pm.

 

If you have any questions, please feel free to get in touch at [info@bettymedia.co.uk](mailto:info@bettymedia.co.uk) 

 

We look forward to hearing from you!

 

The Betty Media team.

‼️ CASTING CALL ‼️

My name is Alisiia, I’m a producer based in Warsaw ✨

I’m looking for a male actor / tv host to film TikTok videos 👥

Age: 27-35
English level: C1, preferably without an accent.
💸Paid
📍London, UK // Europe 

Character: A person who has lived for sports their whole life.

Requirements:
- Ease in conversation
- Ability to maintain a dialogue with strangers
- Clear and understandable delivery of thoughts
- Strong improvisation skills

Appearance: distinctive and memorable
- recognizable hairstyle.
- well-groomed beard and mustache
- a bright, sporty presence
We consider people of all nationalities and races.

The most important things are charisma, confidence, and the feeling that the person truly lives and breathes sports.

If you’re interested, please send me a direct message!📨

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – JOHANNESBURG / PRETORIA ACTORS 🎬
Hi everyone! I’m casting for a short-form comedy web series called Anomalies Anonymous.

👻 Anomalies Anonymous is a mockumentary-style comedy about supernatural beings attending a support group to deal with the challenges of living among humans.

The series follows characters like a fruitarian vampire, a vegan werewolf, a gorgon who struggles with eye contact, a dragon with anger issues, and a ghost who accidentally scares people.

📍 Details:

• Independent short-form comedy series

• Episodes approx. 1 minute long (for social media)

• Filming in Johannesburg / Pretoria

• Unpaid passion project

• Great opportunity for showreel footage and comedic material

🎭 Characters:

🧛 Popovici – vampire

🐺 Gregory – werewolf

🐍 Elena – gorgon

🐉 Iggy – dragon

👻 Sipho – ghost

👤 Daniel – invisible man (voice role)

📩 Interested?

Email me for the audition packet and sides:

caraleanespence17@gmail.com

Feel free to share with actors who might be interested!

✨ Looking forward to hearing from you!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎불크 ANOMALIES ANONYMOUS Safe Space for theUnusual Unusual -Thursdays 7PM All Welcome CASTING CALL ANOMALIES ANONYMOUS Mockumentary Comedy Social Media Series NO JUDGMENT JUSTSUPPORT JUST SUPPORT TOFU BLOOD ORANGE احراه JUICE Pretoria / Johannesburg Multiple roles (20s-40s) Unpaid- Reel footage provided Self-tape auditions caraleanespence17@gmail.com @gmail.com Deadline: March 22, 2026 Audition packet available upon request‎'‎
May be an image of text

topComments.text: I would love to participate, but I do feel using AI in creative spaces is really discouraging.

Situation Vacant at Popeye Village Malta - Animators to Play the role of Popeye the Sailor (the character)

 

**BONUS - WE DO NOT WORK EVENINGS (lastest work till 6.00 p.m.)**

 

Skills Required:
* Has ACTING Background
* Can Dance
* Able to play different roles
* Very Energetic
* Can do a number of voices for puppet shows
* Has to be very polite with customers
* Greet customers daily

Requirements:
* One's Physical Features have to match the Character played
* Fluent in Spoken English
* Has Acting Experience
* Able to move to Malta
* Able to work outside in a Mediterranean Climate
* Team Player

**Offering Seasonal and YEARLY contracts.**

 

**Interested applicants are to send their C.V. on hr@popeyemalta.com or via WhatsApp on +35699231573 and**

**MUST Have E.U. Passport / I.D. Card**

items.text:
OGŁOSZENIE – POSZUKIWANE PARY DO PROGRAMU TELEWIZYJNEGO „GRY MAŁŻEŃSKIE”
Stacja Polsat Cafe poszukuje par (małżeństw lub partnerów) do udziału w nowym, lekkim i rozrywkowym programie telewizyjnym „Gry Małżeńskie”.

To format pełen humoru, emocji i dobrej zabawy, w którym relacje między partnerami zostają wystawione na ciekawą próbę. W programie pojawia się bohaterka wcielająca się w rolę detektywa, która rozmawia z trzema mężczyznami i próbuje odgadnąć, który z nich jest prawdziwym singlem. Dwóch z nich jest w związkach, a jeden jest faktycznie wolny.

Jeśli detektywka uzna, że Twój partner jest prawdziwym singlem, Wasza para wygrywa nagrodę główną w wysokości 3000 zł.

Dodatkowo każda para otrzymuje 1200 zł wynagrodzenia za udział w programie.

Informacje organizacyjne:

 • nagrania odbywają się w weekendy (piątek, sobota lub niedziela),

 • udział obejmuje 2 dni zdjęciowe,

 • zwracamy koszty dojazdu,

 • zapewniamy nocleg w hotelu,

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – FAULTLINE (Short Film)**  
**URGENT: Casting Midlands-based actors for late‑March shoot**

Hi everyone, I’m a final-year Film Production student at the University of Derby, urgently casting for my graduation short film *Faultline* - a gritty coming-of-age drama set in 1980s Derby. The story follows a troubled teenage boy torn between gang loyalty and the last person fighting for him: his grandmother.

We are looking for Midlands-based actors for several lead, supporting, and extra roles, with self-tapes needed as soon as possible.

**Project type:** Student short film
**Filming locations:** Stoke & surrounding Midlands areas
**Shoot period:** End of March : 22nd to 28th

Roles available:

 

**SCOTT (Playing age 16–21)**
A tough, emotionally guarded Midlands teenager drawn into the skinhead scene. Beneath the bravado, he’s vulnerable and conflicted, forced to choose between loyalty to his gang or a chance at redemption.
**Note:** Actor must be comfortable shaving their head on screen for one scene.

**SI / HENNO / SHAW / DAZ (Playing age 16–21)**
Members of a local skinhead gang. Intimidating, confrontational, and deeply loyal to their group.

**Note:** Actors must be comfortable shaving their heads for the role.

**JUNE (Playing age 65–75)**
Scott’s grandmother. Warm, gentle, and quietly resilient, she offers unconditional love and becomes the last person truly fighting for Scott’s future.

 

Please note:

This is a low-budget student production, so unfortunately we are unable to offer payment. However, all travel expenses will be covered, and food will be provided on shoot days.

 

Auditions will be self-tape, with shortlisted actors invited to an in-person call-back in Derby.

 

If you’re interested, please email: saskianatalyafilms@outlook.com where you will be able to receive the full casting call for character breakdowns and submission details.

 

Thank you so much - and please feel free to share with anyone who might be interested!

sharedPost.text:
Kochani moi ! 
Mam kolejny plan ! 
Wrzucam info grzecznościowo ❤️Więcej informacji znajdziecie w szczegółach ❤️ 

Agencja STARS poszukuje osób do krótkiej sesji zdjęciowej w klimacie City Break!
TYLKO OSOBY, KTÓRE JESZCZE NIE BRAŁY UDZIAŁU

📅 Termin: 19.03
📍 Lokalizacja: Warszawa – Śródmieście
⏰ Dyspozycyjność: 1h sesja wykonywana w pierwszej połowie dnia- dokładne godziny dostaną osoby wybrane.
(Zdjęcia trwają 30 minut – dokładna godzina zostanie podana po zgłoszeniu dyspozycyjności w podanym dniu).

📷 O projekcie:
Sesja realizowana jest na użytek wewnętrzny klienta (bez publikacji) – w ramach projektu technologicznego mającego na celu odróżnianie zdjęć profesjonalnych od amatorskich.

💰 Stawka: 100 zł netto
Płatność po podpisaniu umowy na planie oraz wykonaniu zdjęć!

👕 Ubiór:
Schludne, nowoczesne stylizacje, kolorowe, jak zdjęcia na insta.
❗ Bez bieli, czerni oraz czapek zasłaniających twarz.

📩 Zgłoszenia:
Wyślij email na: o.peczak@stars-impresariat.pl podając imię nazwisko, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie.

Możesz zgłaszać również znajomych i rodzinę, paczkę , z którą lubisz się bawić 

Do zobaczenia na planie!

message.text:
Przesunięcie premiery poradnika na 21 marca (sobota)! 📖

Wybaczcie, ale bardzo mi zależy na tym, żeby stworzyć dla Was idealny produkt, który pomoże Wam zacząć swoją przygodę z planem filmowym 😊

Ponad 100 stron praktycznej wiedzy i pięć lat mojego doświadczenia 🎭

Jeszcze chwila 😊

items.text:
**🎬Casting Call! For a STUDENT FILM ‘Playback’🎬 URGENT!**

📍**LOCATION:** Hitchin

📆 **DATES:** Tuesday 17th March – Thursday 19th March

💵 **EXPENSES:** Travel and food expenses will be covered

 

**THERAPIST (Monica/Mark): **An **intelligent and compassionate** therapist who remains **calm** under the pressure of her recent client, Zak, who is certain that he sees things in his sleep. They stay **rational and grounded** around Zak - until unsettling evidence suggests something far more disturbing is happening, which results in a** subtle shift **from** confidence to quiet dread.**

**PLAYING AGE: 20+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**MOTHER/FATHER (Helen/Harry): **A **caring and devoted parent** of Zak who only wants the best for him, through finding it tough to stay strong and rational. Constantly trying to **talk it through** with Zak and questioning his apparent instability while conveying a **maternal instinct** yet a quiet, **emotional strain** as they see Zak spiralling out of control. 

**PLAYING AGE: 30+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**📖SYNOPSIS:** After coming face to face with a sinister figure in the middle of the night, Zak; a young man suffering with mental health issues (or so he’s been told), decides to film himself whilst he sleeps to prove that the figure is more than just an illusion. These odd behaviours are worrying to his **mother/father,** who want the best for him. After showing the footage to his **therapist** (who claims to see nothing), he decides that it is time to take things into his own hands. Instead of going to sleep, he waits for the figure to strike and deals a killing blow. Having caught it all on camera, he shows the proof to his **therapist,** who soon realises that the figure was Zak’s **mother/father** and that perhaps their next session should be separated by a prison cell...

 

Please email [playbacktalent@gmail.com](mailto:playbacktalent@gmail.com) if you are interested, or want further information, with a headshot and showreel if applicable! 😊

Actriz para Instagram Stories - España
📍 Remoto, trabajo según el encargo técnico

Se busca actriz para grabar videos cortos para Instagram y Stories. La actriz debe desempeñar el papel de astróloga y grabar videos sobre este tema, así como contenido en vivo para interactuar con la audiencia.

💰 Sueldo: 800-1200€

🎯 Qué hacer:

✅ Grabar videos cortos según el encargo técnico (enviamos el texto) varias veces a la semana

✅ Grabar contenido en vivo (en la calle, en cafeterías, etc.)

✅ Tomar fotos y participar en sesiones fotográficas

🔗 Requisitos:

✔️ Hablar de manera clara y tener una apariencia agradable

✔️ Cumplir con los plazos

✔️ Edad entre 28 y 40 años

✔️ Responsabilidad

✔️ Anonimato: no publicar contenido laboral en tu perfil

‼️ Solo colaboración a largo plazo

Si te interesa, escribe por WhatsApp o correo electrónico:

Nombre

Edad

¿Tienes experiencia similar?

❌ No consideramos bloggers ni personas públicas. Tampoco consideramos a quienes siempre están grabando publicidad o actuando como extras.

👤 Contacto:

📱 Katya (WhatsApp) +380966751530

Correo electrónico: katrin.astro.digital@gmail.com

*⃣ WA: wa.me/966751530

Let's go from dreams to movie screens.

items.text:
Hello everyone!

I'm producing a new online TV show, Lucid Dreams, and we’re on the hunt for some cast members! We’re looking for TWO security guards!

You need to be within TFL serving area (ideally London itself) to minimise travel times.

Date: 15/03
Time: 13:00 (filming to start at 13:30, so on time arrival is imperative)
Loc: NW10 6SJ (full address to be given upon casting for privacy reasons)
Pay: unpaid, but travel is reimbursed.

REQUIRED: The Security guards NEED to be taller than the lead, so you need to be taller than 6 foot. Below is the first episode, and Kevin is the lead.

https://www.instagram.com/reel/DVZIiOaDGHy/?igsh=MWJyMGV6dWh5bGpqeg==

Please message me with a showreel/CV if you, or anyone you know, is interested, and I’ll pass it onto the director for discussion.

Thanks! 😊

items.text:
**Casting call**

Film title- The Learning Curve

I am second year student at SAE institute Liverpool. I am looking for people to play these two characters for my student short film

James- 14, male. A once respectful and well mannered student, James is now burdened by personal issues at home. This has resulted in his turning to the wrong influence and because of this has became disrespectful and arrogant. His cocky attitude masks his issues and lack of trust. 

Mr Anfil- Early 40s, male. He is withdrawn due to his personal problems leaving him exhausted as a teacher. Mentally drained and disconnected by his own issues, he finds it difficult to pay attention to his own students and job.

Short overview- a short drama about a teacher named Mr. Anfil attempting to talk and guide a badly influenced high school student James in the right direction.

Shooting dates at on the 20th and 27th at 9-12 in the morning both days. Both days at Southport College. I will cover any reasonable expenses within the local area of Merseyside.

If you feel like you would fit any of these two roles contact me via message on this platform. Or contact our director via email

**dansimmo9106@gmail.com**

IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS PLEASE MESSAGE ME AND IF YOU NEED ANYMORE DETAILS THE LINK TO THE MANDY PAGE WILL BE POSTED BELOEW

https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3112363/the-learning-curve/

items.text:
Hi! We’re currently casting for an upcoming YouTube Imposter Series,to take part in a conversation while trying to identify the “imposter” in the group.

We’re reaching out to see if any of your members would be interested in taking part. It’s a fun, conversation-based video about acting, and a great chance for participants to showcase their personalities and gain exposure.

If anyone from your society is interested, they can sign up here. We’d also really appreciate it if you could share it with your members:  
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf9WkezvlEdc-p2U2jttABpEtWYUi_mf-FVpsSVxAFGTFfcEQ/viewform?fbzx=-4212969923431272085&fbclid=PAVERFWAQinPJleHRuA2FlbQIxMABzcnRjBmFwcF9pZA8xMjQwMjQ1NzQyODc0MTQAAaeX7VhTSGudwM93dbFEKnHoGjAwSkxFAxKmcMxGL9VlQrk34_FbF_CZ_0hnrA_aem_9txVOlNPY4qFp6-yAxN2hw

items.text:
CASTING CALL FOR MALE ACTOR MUSICIANS
Open casting call for an upcoming comedy show at Greenwich Theatre. 

“Catch” is a drama-comedy play about two midwives told through a series of monologues, live music and physical comedy. 

Casting two male presenting actors for the love interest role of “Him” and other parts. Looking for actors with great comic timing, ability to multi role and open to all instruments. 

“Him” (18-27) is a doctor and is described as charming, funny and “literally perfect” however what he has in charm, he lacks in loyalty. 

Rehearsals starts ASAP in London and actors must be available for w/c 4th of May as show days are on 6th-9th May at 7pm.

The role is paid but will be based on sales and fundraising. This is a great post grad job for a professional credit and networking. 

For more details please drop me a message or email emilynancy003@gmail.com 

Hoping to cast this week! 

Best wishes, 

Emily

items.text:
Casting dla rodzin -CAŁA POLSKA
🚨 CASTING DO NOWEGO PROGRAMU TELEWIZYJNEGO! 🚨

Produkcja ogólnopolskiego programu telewizyjnego poszukuje rodzin z całej Polski, które chciałyby przeżyć wyjątkową przygodę i wziąć udział w projekcie pokazującym, jak bardzo mogą różnić się codzienne realia życia.

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Kogo szukamy?

Szukamy dwóch typów rodzin:

🔹 Rodzin żyjących skromnie, które każdego dnia mierzą się z finansowymi wyzwaniami, ale mają w sobie dużo ciepła, energii i autentyczności.

🔹 Rodzin bardzo dobrze sytuowanych, prowadzących komfortowe życie, które są otwarte na nowe doświadczenia i chciałyby na chwilę spojrzeć na codzienność z zupełnie innej perspektywy.

To niezwykła okazja, aby poznać inny świat, przeżyć coś wyjątkowego i pokazać prawdziwe życie polskich rodzin.

💰 Co oferujemy?

✔ wynagrodzenie finansowe za udział w programie

✔ pełne wsparcie produkcji podczas realizacji

✔ niezapomnianą przygodę i wyjątkowe doświadczenie

📍 Szukamy rodzin z całej Polski

📩 Jak się zgłosić?

Wyślij zgłoszenie na mail: dwierodziny@gmail.com

W wiadomości podaj:

• imiona i wiek domowników

• miejscowość

• krótkie nagranie telefonem (kilka zdań o Waszej rodzinie i sytuacji życiowej)

• numer telefonu do kontaktu

✨ Może to właśnie Wasza rodzina stanie się częścią tego wyjątkowego programu!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING! DO NOWEGO PROGRAMU TV! Rodziny w trudnej sytuacji finansowej. SZUKAMY RODZIN DO ZAMIANY ŻYCIA! Zamożne rodziny z luksusowym życiem Przeżyj niezwykłą przygodę i zobacz życie z innej perspektywy! Wysokie Pełne wynagrodzenie! wsparcie produkcji! ZGŁOŠ SIĘ TERAZ! dwierodziny dwierodziny@gmail.com @gmail.co Telefon Filmik zgłoszeniowy!'

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — AKTOR DO ROLI WIZERUNKOWEJ (FINTECH PROJECT)**

Do realizacji wizerunkowego spotu dla młodej firmy z branży fintech poszukujemy aktora:

**Profil:**
* mężczyzna w wieku 30–45 lat
* biznesowy, profesjonalny wygląd
* naturalna prezencja przed kamerą
* komunikatywny język angielski (min. poziom B2/C1 — wymagane nagranie próbki)

**Szczegóły:**
* zdjęcia w Warszawie
* zaangażowanie: ok. pół dnia zdjęciowego
* termin: do ustalenia (w najbliższym czasie)
* produkcja wizerunkowa / corporate style

Prosimy o przesyłanie:
* aktualnych zdjęć (portret + sylwetka)
* krótkiej próbki wideo w języku angielskim
* informacji o dostępności

Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać w wiadomości prywatnej

Help me get the word out to families! I’ll be attaching a flyer—please feel free to share it with your database and post on social media.

If you know a teacher or mentor who would like to be featured, I’d love to connect with them as well.

Call or email me with any questions. Thank you for helping spread the word

Make sure they mention your program and my name when applying and I can fast track their applications straight to the producers 

 NOW CASTING! 

Know a curious kid who loves building, tinkering, coding, or experimenting?

A brand-new **Netflix competition series — Schooled! — from Mark Rober’s CrunchLabs is looking for bright young minds ages 9–17 to compete in teams of two for an INSANELY HUGE cash prize. 

 Creative thinkers

 Robotics lovers

 Problem solvers

 Hands-on builders

Kids can apply solo or with a partner (friend, classmate, sibling, or STEM teammate).

 Parents must apply with their kids.

Please share with your friends, family, followers — anyone who might know an amazing young inventor, builder, or future engineer.

Apply here: [https://crunchlabsacademy.com/](https://crunchlabsacademy.com/)

items.text:
**Casting Call - Volunteer, Non-union, IMDB credit, Snippet**

I'm casting for a comedy film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film.

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

**Casting:**
Jason (23-35) Caucasian, charismatic, manipulative, eloquent, materialistic, and cynical. He is a dating guru who teaches Vijay dating lessons. Shoot on 11th April.

Sophia/Soni (22-35) Strong and confident, sassy, eloquent, bold, and can be impulsive. **Any ethnicity.** She had a recent break and is now going through a rebound. Shoot on 11th and 12th April.

Rumi (23-35) Self-assured, quick-witted, open-minded, and straightforward. **Any ethnicity**. Shoot on 12th April.

Christine (22-33) Charming, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April.

Additional Characters

Tyler- 25-55, honest, humble, and attentive. Any ethnicity.

Bartender experience is plus but not must. Shoot on 12th April.

Vijay's Father- 45-65, conservative, Southasian, Indian accent (preferably). shoot on 11th April.

Vijay's Mother- 45-65, conservative, Southasian, Indian accent (preferably). Shoot on 11th April.

Vijay's date- 35-45, Normal to higher weight, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April.

Vijay's Girlfriend- 23-35, Any ethnicity.

Gym Girl- 25-35, in good shape, any ethnicity. Shoot on 11th April.

People in Bar- Men and Women in their 20s and 30s. Need 3 women and 3 men. Any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April.

**Location:** Vancouver Downtown and Kitsilano

**Date:** 11th and 12th April, 2026

**Pay:** Volunteer, IMDB credit, Snippet

**To Apply:**
Please email **tomar.gautam2@yahoo.com** with:
• Resume
• Headshots
• Demo reel (if available)

Subject line: **“Characater and your name”**

topComments.text: I sent an email. Looking forward to hearing back.
Are u accepting resumes from people with no acting experience ?

items.text:
VANCOUVER CASTING: The project is called Easy Money. We have actors that have worked on Avatar: The Last Airbender, Fire Country, and Mulan to name a few. Our DOP has done camera work on The Good Doctor. This is an independently funded project, so the actors will not be paid. We are going through the union under ULB. Please DM me your headshot, demo reel, resume, and socials. Only potential candidates will be contacted. Actors will receive footage and IMDB credit. 

Ryan 
Age: 30-50
Gender: Male
Description:
He is a businessman. Think The Wolf of Wall Street. He does blow to keep his energy up throughout the day.

Helen
Age: 40-58
Gender:  Female
Description:
By day, she is a bus driver, and by night, she gets high on crack.

Alisha
Age: 25-35
Gender: Female
Description: She is a sex worker who does heroin. She offers a sexual favor to Alex in exchange for drugs.

Gurvinder
Age: 25-40
Gender: Male
Description:
We are looking for an East Indian or someone who can play that. He is from Surrey and was a former high school soccer player. He is an obnoxious character. Very arrogant. He likes to party hard on the weekends by drinking Crown and snorting coke with his homies.

film fabularny

Do filmu fabularnego o początkach kariery Adama Małysza poszukuję Epizodystów w wieku 20-50 lat, którzy chcieliby przeżyć przygodę na planie i wcielić się w role laborantów. 

Stawka - 250 zł 

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl
W tytule maila: E26 
Zgłoszenie musi zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki z dnia zgłoszenia, ewentualne doświadczenie i wizytówka
ZDJĘCIE TWARZY: Portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

Do zobaczenia na planie :)

items.title: Witam serdecznie 🙂

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 – Szukamy dziewczyny 18 – 20 lat do roli Eli**

Szukamy skarbu Templariuszy z 1307 roku!

 

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’**Grupa1940**’’ poszukuje dziewczyny 18 – 20 lat młodo wyglądającej do roli Eli najlepiej mieszkającej w Gliwicach lub okolicach ( Zabrze, Katowice najdalej ) Postać będzie mieć dialogi po polsku. Szukamy osób bez farbowanych włosów czy malowanych paznokciach oraz kolczyków jakichkolwiek na twarzy.

 

Młoda 20 letnia** **dziewczyna. Wysoka i szczupła o długich włosach. W czasie okupacji niemieckiej razem z Stefanem i Wandą uczestniczą w kilku akcjach patriotycznych ,które na celu mają m.in. klejenie na murach plakatów. Podczas jednej z akcji ratuje Wandę i Stefana przed śmiercią z ręki niemieckiego żołnierza strzelając do niego z broni ojca wcześniej pożyczonej. Podkochuje się w Stefanie ale nie mówi mi tego na początku.

** **

Szukamy kogoś z **Gliwic lub okolic**: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie. Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Od maja do końca sieprnia  szykujemy się do kilku scen bitewnych z francuzami. Kilka postaci ma nieduże kwestie po niemiecku. **Mundur i wyposażenie jesteśmy w stanie pożyczać.**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

attachments.ocrText: May be a black-and-white image of one or more people, bangs and text that says '"Grupa "Grupa 1940" Oryginalne materiały 2025'
