items.text:
**GDAŃSK (nie zwracamy za dojazd i nocleg) **

🎥 **CASTING - NAGRANIA **🎥

Szukamy **4 osób (kobiety i mężczyźni, wiek 40+)** do nagrania krótkich filmów reklamowych dla marek **Yerbador** oraz **Sakuro Matcha** - najlepsza Matcha i Yerba na polskim rynku.

Nagrania będą realizowane w formie **krótkich rolek do social mediów**. Sceny będą proste i naturalne - inspirowane codziennymi sytuacjami. Każda osoba wystąpi samodzielnie i w innej wynajętej przestrzeni.

**Kogo szukamy:**
* osób, które **czują się swobodnie przed kamerą**
* potrafią **naturalnie i płynnie mówić**
* mile widziane doświadczenie, ale **nie jest konieczne**

Teksty będą **przygotowane i wyświetlane na prompterze.**

**Szczegóły nagrania:**
📍Gdańsk/Gdynia
⏱czas zdjęć: ok. 6 godzin
📅 termin: do ustalenia indywidualnie
💵 stawka: 200 zł do ręki po zdjęciach (nasza agencja nie pochwala takim stawkom, ale nie mamy na to wpływu)

**Pola eksploatacji:** bez ograniczeń terytorialnych, ilościowych i czasowych.

**ZGŁOSZENIA:**
📩 yokan.std@gmail.com
**Tytuł maila:** CASTING - Yerba

**W treści maila:** imię, wiek, numer telefonu, aktualne zdjęcie twarzy oraz aktualne zdjęcie całej sylwetki **+ najważniejsze:** krótkie nagranie, na którym Cię słychać jak się wypowiadasz - luźna wypowiedź w stylu vlogowym. Nagranie może być wykonane telefonem. Najlepiej wrzuć film na **YouTube jako link niepubliczny** i prześlij nam link w zgłoszeniu.

**+ Dyspozycyjność **- przynajmniej w marcu, określ ją mniej więcej. Jakie dni i godziny na tak, jakie definitywnie na nie.

🎥 Zapraszamy do zgłoszeń. 🎥

**ZGŁOSZENIA:**
📩 yokan.std@gmail.com
**Tytuł maila:** CASTING - Yerba

**W treści maila:** imię, wiek, numer telefonu, aktualne zdjęcie twarzy oraz aktualne zdjęcie całej sylwetki **+ najważniejsze:** krótkie nagranie, na którym Cię słychać jak się wypowiadasz - luźna wypowiedź w stylu vlogowym. Nagranie może być wykonane telefonem. Najlepiej wrzuć film na **YouTube jako link niepubliczny** i prześlij nam link w zgłoszeniu.

**+ Dyspozycyjność **- przynajmniej w marcu, określ ją mniej więcej. Jakie dni i godziny na tak, jakie definitywnie na nie.

🎥 Zapraszamy do zgłoszeń. 🎥
items.title: **GDAŃSK (nie zwracamy za dojazd i nocleg) **

items.text:
GULLIVER’S WORLD IS CASTING FOR PERFORMERS TO JOIN OUR EXPERIENCE CAST 

DANCERS, ACTORS, STREET THEATRE PERFORMERS, ACTIVITY RANGERS & STAGE PRESENTERS

OPEN AUDITION & INTERVIEWS : GULLIVER'S WORLD, WARRINGTON - FLEXIBLE OPPORTUNITIES FOR BOTH DAYTIME & EVENING PROGRAMMING

COME ALONG AND MEET THE CASTING TEAM
FRIDAY 20TH MARCH 2026 -  Gulliver's World Resort Hotel, Shackleton Close, Warrington, WA5 9YZ.  Registration at 6pm.  Report to the hotel reception with your CV.   Please come with suitable attire to dance.  

Free car parking available on site.  If you cannot make the audition date but are interested in 2026 opportunities, please email Casting with your CV and more information on your availability.

Street Theatre Entertainers: Delivering spooky fun and interactive experiences, captivating guests with your improvisation and character creation skills. If you have any circus skills or stilt experience this would advantageous. 
Dancers: Shine in our daytime, street theatre and evening concerts.

Stage Presenters: Bring alive the magic at our resort taking part in staged events, shows and pop up live events.

Activity Rangers: Help take our overnight adventure to the next level on our activity sleepovers.  You will be embracing the great outdoors delivering bushcraft, firefighting, den building or being the face of nature activities for educational sleep-overs and activity camps. Full concept training provided.

casting@gulliversfun.co.uk

items.text:
“One can’t just shoot anybody on the street!”

 

Sound familiar from recent events in America?

 

It’s actually a line from *Charlie *and *Striptease *a double-bill of hilarious political comedies written in the Soviet era by award-winning Polish writer Slawomir Mrozek.

 

I’m delighted to share that DRH Arts is presenting these hilarious but thought-provoking plays (in English translation) at The Golden Goose Theatre in Camberwell from 21 April to 9 May. The theatre is just down the road from Oval.  

 

The plays, with four actors, expose the world of authoritarian government, secret police, informers and surveillance, through fast-moving comedy and satire. 

 

Full details can be found in the leaflet attached here and on the venue website:

 

[https://www.goldengoosetheatre.co.uk/whatson/charlie-and-striptease](https://www.goldengoosetheatre.co.uk/whatson/charlie-and-striptease) 

 

Follow us on Instagram @drh.arts for cast info, production updates and news.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'DRH Arts and Orsolya Nagy present Charlie+Striptease Written by Sławomir Mrożek double-bill of hilarious political theatre from the Soviet era, absurdly relevant in today's world including Trump's America and mass surveillance! 21 April-9 May 2026 7.30 pm Wed and Sat matinees 2.30 pm GOLDEN GOOSE THEATRE 146 Camberwell New Rd, London SE5 ORR www.goldengoosetheatre.co.uk'
May be an image of text

Sound familiar from recent events in America?

 

It’s actually a line from *Charlie *and *Striptease *a double-bill of hilarious political comedies written in the Soviet era by award-winning Polish writer Slawomir Mrozek.

 

I’m delighted to share that DRH Arts is presenting these hilarious but thought-provoking plays (in English translation) at The Golden Goose Theatre in Camberwell from 21 April to 9 May. The theatre is just down the road from Oval.  

 

The plays, with four actors, expose the world of authoritarian government, secret police, informers and surveillance, through fast-moving comedy and satire. 

 

Full details can be found in the leaflet attached here and on the venue website:

 

[https://www.goldengoosetheatre.co.uk/whatson/charlie-and-striptease](https://www.goldengoosetheatre.co.uk/whatson/charlie-and-striptease) 

 

Follow us on Instagram @drh.arts for cast info, production updates and news.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – FAULTLINE (Short Film)**
**URGENT: Casting Midlands-based actors for late‑March shoot**

Hi everyone, I’m a final-year Film Production student at the University of Derby, urgently casting for my graduation short film *Faultline* - a gritty coming-of-age drama set in 1980s Derby. The story follows a troubled teenage boy torn between gang loyalty and the last person fighting for him: his grandmother.

We are looking for Midlands-based actors for several lead, supporting, and extra roles, with self-tapes needed as soon as possible.

**Project type:** Student short film
**Filming locations:** Stoke & surrounding Midlands areas
**Shoot period:** End of March : 22nd to 28th

Roles available:

**SCOTT (Playing age 16–21)**
A tough, emotionally guarded Midlands teenager drawn into the skinhead scene. Beneath the bravado, he’s vulnerable and conflicted, forced to choose between loyalty to his gang or a chance at redemption.
**Note:** Actor must be comfortable shaving their head on screen for one scene.

**SI / HENNO / SHAW / DAZ (Playing age 16–21)**
Members of a local skinhead gang. Intimidating, confrontational, and deeply loyal to their group.
**Note:** Actors must be comfortable shaving their heads for the role.

**JUNE (Playing age 65–75)**
Scott’s grandmother. Warm, gentle, and quietly resilient, she offers unconditional love and becomes the last person truly fighting for Scott’s future.

Please note:

This is a low-budget student production, so unfortunately we are unable to offer payment. However, all travel expenses will be covered, and food will be provided on shoot days.

Auditions will be self-tape, with shortlisted actors invited to an online call-back in Derby.

If you’re interested, please email: saskianatalyafilms@outlook.com where you will be able to receive the full casting call for character breakdowns and submission details.

Thank you so much - and please feel free to share with anyone who might be interested!

GULLIVER’S WORLD IS CASTING FOR PERFORMERS TO JOIN OUR EXPERIENCE CAST 

DANCERS, ACTORS, STREET THEATRE PERFORMERS, ACTIVITY RANGERS & STAGE PRESENTERS

OPEN AUDITION & INTERVIEWS : GULLIVER'S WORLD, WARRINGTON - FLEXIBLE OPPORTUNITIES FOR BOTH DAYTIME & EVENING PROGRAMMING

COME ALONG AND MEET THE CASTING TEAM
FRIDAY 20TH MARCH 2026 -  Gulliver's World Resort Hotel, Shackleton Close, Warrington, WA5 9YZ.  Registration at 6pm.  Report to the hotel reception with your CV.   Please come with suitable attire to dance.  

Free car parking available on site.  If you cannot make the audition date but are interested in 2026 opportunities, please email Casting with your CV and more information on your availability.

Street Theatre Entertainers: Delivering spooky fun and interactive experiences, captivating guests with your improvisation and character creation skills. If you have any circus skills or stilt experience this would advantageous. 
Dancers: Shine in our daytime, street theatre and evening concerts.

Stage Presenters: Bring alive the magic at our resort taking part in staged events, shows and pop up live events.

Activity Rangers: Help take our overnight adventure to the next level on our activity sleepovers.  You will be embracing the great outdoors delivering bushcraft, firefighting, den building or being the face of nature activities for educational sleep-overs and activity camps. Full concept training provided.

items.title: # **🎬😂 CALLING ALL ACTORS & FILMMAKERS – READY FOR A WEEKEND OF LAUGHS; FILMS; NETWORKING & WORKSHOPS?**

items.text:
🎭 LAST MINUTE – URGENT CASTING CALL
Read All Information Before Applying

[PROJECT DESCRIPTION]

A bold new theatre stage production currently in development that will later transition into a Drama Series streaming on major Streaming Television platforms.

What it's About? 

A gritty, fast-paced contemporary thriller exploring the realities of modern life. The story dives deep into powerful human emotions including greed, envy, hatred, love, betrayal, and the pursuit of peace, delivering an intense and emotionally charged narrative designed for both stage and screen.

Each character is inspired by raw, everyday realities, bringing authenticity and depth to the performance.

Creative Tone References:

Projects with a similar grounded tone include films such as Ill Manors, City of Lights, Fish Tank, Everywhere & Nowhere, and Sugarush.

This project is being developed with a clear pathway towards an on-screen drama series aimed at major platforms including:

Netflix, Amazon Studios, Apple TV+, A24, Sky Studios, Facebook Watch, HBO, Hulu, Film4, Paramount+, Pluto TV, Plex, Mubi and ITV Studios.

🎬 ROLE |

Gender: Female

Age Range: 20's to 30's

White/Caucasian

Personality: Wild, free-spirited, bubbly, energetic City Girl

A vibrant young woman navigating the emotional chaos of city life

This role requires someone comfortable with improvisational acting and natural emotional expressions.

You aren't required to learn a script. Cast will be provided with:

A Character Backstory

A short Monologue to help you begin the performance

Improvisation guidance will be given by the Director during rehearsals

🎭 PERFORMANCE DETAILS |

Theatre Stage Performance Date:

📅 23rd March 2026

⏰ 5:00 PM

📍 UK, London

🎬 REHEARSAL DETAILS |

Rehearsals will take place in group sessions with the Director and Acting Coach.

📅 17th March 2026 – 6:30 PM

📅 22nd March 2026 – 6:30 PM

⏱ Duration: Approx. 30-40 minutes each session

📍 Camden Studio 

Further production development and rehearsal sessions may continue March–September 2026.

💰 COMPENSATION |

This production begins as a development stage play, forming the foundation for a television series adaptation.

Full production budgets and funding will be secured once the on-screen series phase moves forward onto the next stage.

This is an opportunity to join a project Early and Grow with it.

Patience and long-term vision are essential.

🌟 WHO SHOULD APPLY?

We are looking for someone who is:

Based in UK, London (Strictly ONLY)

Reliable and serious about acting

Available for the performance and rehearsals

Comfortable performing with improvisation

Open to training and development

Experience is welcome but not required.

Applicants who get selected will receive ongoing coaching, training, and mentorship to help develop them into a working professional acting brand.

📩 HOW TO APPLY?

Send The Following via Inbox OR E-Mail:

- Full Name

- Age

- Location

- Headshot and Portfolio If You Own One

- Contact Number 

- Social Media Handles (if any)

Short Introduction About Yourself Why You Want to Join As The Cast

Acting Experience (if any)

Applications will be reviewed immediately due to urgent casting requirements.

⚠️ Serious applicants Only. Availability for the dates listed is essential.

You will be sent credentials of the company and the services we provide of those who apply.

E-Mail Address: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com
items.summary:
🎭 LAST MINUTE – URGENT CASTING CALL
Read All Information Before Applying

[PROJECT DESCRIPTION]

A bold new theatre stage production currently in development that will later transition into a Drama Series streaming on major Streaming Television platforms.

What it's About? 

A gritty, fast-paced contemporary thriller exploring the realities of modern life. The story dives deep into powerful human emotions including greed, envy, hatred, love, betrayal, and the pursuit of peace, delivering an intense and emotionally charged narrative designed for both stage and screen.

Each character is inspired by raw, everyday realities, bringing authenticity and depth to the performance.

Creative Tone References:

Projects with a similar grounded tone include films such as Ill Manors, City of Lights, Fish Tank, Everywhere & Nowhere, and Sugarush.

This project is being developed with a clear pathway towards an on-screen drama series aimed at major platforms including:

Netflix, Amazon Studios, Apple TV+, A24, Sky Studios, Facebook Watch, HBO, Hulu, Film4, Paramount+, Pluto TV, Plex, Mubi and ITV Studios.

🎬 ROLE |

Gender: Female

Age Range: 20's to 30's

White/Caucasian

Personality: Wild, free-spirited, bubbly, energetic City Girl

A vibrant young woman navigating the emotional chaos of city life

This role requires someone comfortable with improvisational acting and natural emotional expressions.

You aren't required to learn a script. Cast will be provided with:

A Character Backstory

A short Monologue to help you begin the performance

Improvisation guidance will be given by the Director during rehearsals

🎭 PERFORMANCE DETAILS |

Theatre Stage Performance Date:

📅 23rd March 2026

⏰ 5:00 PM

📍 UK, London

🎬 REHEARSAL DETAILS |

Rehearsals will take place in group sessions with the Director and Acting Coach.

📅 17th March 2026 – 6:30 PM

📅 22nd March 2026 – 6:30 PM

⏱ Duration: Approx. 30-40 minutes each session

📍 Camden Studio 

Further production development and rehearsal sessions may continue March–September 2026.

💰 COMPENSATION |

This production begins as a development stage play, forming the foundation for a television series adaptation.

Full production budgets and funding will be secured once the on-screen series phase moves forward onto the next stage.

This is an opportunity to join a project Early and Grow with it.

Patience and long-term vision are essential.

🌟 WHO SHOULD APPLY?

We are looking for someone who is:

Based in UK, London (Strictly ONLY)

Reliable and serious about acting

Available for the performance and rehearsals

Comfortable performing with improvisation

Open to training and development

Experience is welcome but not required.

Applicants who get selected will receive ongoing coaching, training, and mentorship to help develop them into a working professional acting brand.

📩 HOW TO APPLY?

Send The Following via Inbox OR E-Mail:

- Full Name

- Age

- Location

- Headshot and Portfolio If You Own One

- Contact Number

⚠️ Serious applicants Only. Availability for the dates listed is essential.

items.text:
📣Calling All Male Performers for "Oklahoma!"📣
Havering Music Makers are seeking talented male performers for their upcoming production of Rodgers & Hammerstein's "Oklahoma!" at the Queen's Theatre, Hornchurch.

We are particularly looking to cast the role of Curly, as well as several smaller male roles. If you have a passion for musical theatre and are looking for an exciting opportunity to showcase your skills, we want to hear from you!

Rehearsals are typically every Thursday from 8-10 PM at Tweed Way Hall in Romford.

If you are interested in auditioning, drop me a message!

(This is an unpaid project)

items.text:
Now Hiring Teaching Artists
Do you love sharing your creative skills with others? Future Hearts, Minds & Dreamers (FHMD) is looking for passionate teaching artists to lead arts enrichment workshops for youth and seniors in communities across the country, both in person and online.

We are currently seeking instructors in areas such as:

Dance • Yoga • Photography • Film • Theatre • Creative Writing • Visual Arts • Culinary Arts • Language Arts • Martial Arts • and more.

About the role

Teach engaging arts classes for ages 2 through 50+

Sessions typically run 6–10 weeks, meeting once per week

Classes are 45–60 minutes long

Flexible scheduling — great for working artists

Pay: $40–$60 per class

Our teaching artists are working professionals who are passionate about guiding the creative growth of students through hands-on exploration, practical knowledge, and self-reflection. Instructors may teach from our existing class offerings or design their own classes.

FHMD programs operate across the U.S., including California, Colorado, Arizona, Texas, Florida, New York, Washington D.C., and many more states.

Requirements

Experience teaching in your artistic field

Reliable transportation

Ability to provide materials, a materials list, or a materials fee

This is a great opportunity for creative professionals looking for flexible teaching opportunities between projects, productions, or other work.

Send your resume to: fhmd@fhmdfhmd.com

Learn more: fhmdfhmd.com/now-hiring

Future Hearts, Minds & Dreamers is committed to building an inclusive community where diverse perspectives and creative voices are valued.

items.text:
Howdy y’all, this fall I’m directing a western short film that’ll be put into festivals and am beginning to cast the lead four!

Contact me via facebook messenger, please and thank you!

Location: Atlanta, Georgia
Genre: Western
When: Early to Mid September, 2026
Schedule: Five Day Shooting, Two Days Wardrobe/ Make Up Rehearsal 
Rates: $150/ Day for Rehearsal, $250/ Day for Filming (Negotiable based on experience, lodging can be provided for those out of state)
Note: All roles have slight bit of prop weapon work involved (notes attached to each character)

Below are descriptions of the husband (protagonist), Morgan (antagonist), and Bill (antagonist). I am already in talks with someone for the lead actress. 

Woman: Mid to Late 20’s. Confident, outspoken, intelligent, determined. A stoic settler who moved from the north down south after the war, raised to be self sufficient as well as kind. Knows when to talk just as well as she does when to stay quiet, and is never one to let her mind go unspoken. A calm, clean, and silent figure unlike the western world around her. 
Weapon(s): Bow and Arrows, Revolver
Character Influences: Harmonica (Once Upon a Time in the West), Douglas Mortimer (For a Few Dollars More), Rain (Alien: Romulus),  Ellie (The Last of Us: Part II)

Husband: Mid to Late 20’s. Kind, gentle natured, war-worn. A former Union soldier turned sheriff before his retiring to the peaceful country life he imagined with his wife. 
Weapon(s): Bow and Arrows
Character Inspirations: Atticus Finch (To Kill a Mockingbird), Paul Edgecomb (The Green Mile)

Morgan: Late 30’s to Early 40’s, Caucasian male. Tall, lean/ lanky, sharp features, a plus if you can pull off a sharp gaze/ squint. Calculating, cunning, known for putting up a gentle act to hide dark natures of his own intentions. A former confederate soldier who lost his family home during the Civil War, now turning to crime and on the run with his partner, another former confederate soldier named Bill who he treats like a sidekick to be used as a tool. Lived a once privileged life, and now wishes to do anything to return to it. 
Weapon(s): Rifle
Character Inspirations: Angel Eyes (The Good, the Bad, and the Ugly), Anton Chigurh (No Country for Old Men), Commodus (Gladiator)

Bill: Mid to Late 30’s, Caucasian male. Burly, former boxer type of build gone softer. Reluctant, gentle, one track mind type of person. Former soldier who became a boxer after the war when his farm was burned down, taken in by Morgan who he sees as his guide through this post war life of his. Isn’t particularly a fan of his criminal life, but is lingering on the fading hope that he can go back to his farmer life one day. 
Weapon(s): Revolver, Knife
Character Inspirations: Fezzik (The Princess Bride), The Monster (Frankenstein)

topComments.text: Are you looking for crew? I’m happy to serve as a PA or anywhere else on set I can be of service!
I’m 28 and also an actor, if you could send me some more info to audition I’m interested in the role of the husband

items.summary:
Howdy y’all, this fall I’m directing a western short film that’ll be put into festivals and am beginning to cast the lead four!

Contact me via facebook messenger, please and thank you!

Location: Atlanta, Georgia
Genre: Western
When: Early to Mid September, 2026
Schedule: Five Day Shooting, Two Days Wardrobe/ Make Up Rehearsal 
Rates: $150/ Day for Rehearsal, $250/ Day for Filming (Negotiable based on experience, lodging can be provided for those out of state)
Note: All roles have slight bit of prop weapon work involved (notes attached to each character)

Below are descriptions of the husband (protagonist), Morgan (antagonist), and Bill (antagonist). I am already in talks with someone for the lead actress. 

Woman: Mid to Late 20’s. Confident, outspoken, intelligent, determined. A stoic settler who moved from the north down south after the war, raised to be self sufficient as well as kind. Knows when to talk just as well as she does when to stay quiet, and is never one to let her mind go unspoken. A calm, clean, and silent figure unlike the western world around her. 
Weapon(s): Bow and Arrows, Revolver
Character Influences: Harmonica (Once Upon a Time in the West), Douglas Mortimer (For a Few Dollars More), Rain (Alien: Romulus),  Ellie (The Last of Us: Part II)

Husband: Mid to Late 20’s. Kind, gentle natured, war-worn. A former Union soldier turned sheriff before his retiring to the peaceful country life he imagined with his wife. 
Weapon(s): Bow and Arrows
Character Inspirations: Atticus Finch (To Kill a Mockingbird), Paul Edgecomb (The Green Mile)

Morgan: Late 30’s to Early 40’s, Caucasian male. Tall, lean/ lanky, sharp features, a plus if you can pull off a sharp gaze/ squint. Calculating, cunning, known for putting up a gentle act to hide dark natures of his own intentions. A former confederate soldier who lost his family home during the Civil War, now turning to crime and on the run with his partner, another former confederate soldier named Bill who he treats like a sidekick to be used as a tool. Lived a once privileged life, and now wishes to do anything to return to it. 
Weapon(s): Rifle
Character Inspirations: Angel Eyes (The Good, the Bad, and the Ugly), Anton Chigurh (No Country for Old Men), Commodus (Gladiator)

Bill: Mid to Late 30’s, Caucasian male. Burly, former boxer type of build gone softer. Reluctant, gentle, one track mind type of person. Former soldier who became a boxer after the war when his farm was burned down, taken in by Morgan who he sees as his guide through this post war life of his. Isn’t particularly a fan of his criminal life, but is lingering on the fading hope that he can go back to his farmer life one day. 
Weapon(s): Revolver, Knife
Character Inspirations: Fezzik (The Princess Bride), The Monster (Frankenstein)

message.text: Habt ihr das auch gehabt? Ein Bett ohne Füße, auf dem Boden, überall weiße Flokatis. Es war die Zeit von Deep Purple, Uriah Heep, Cream, Stones, Genesis, dann Klaus Lage und so viele mehr. Das war so ab 1976 bis circa 1984. Überall in der Wohnung meiner Eltern roch nach Patchulli und Räucherstäbchen. Der tägliche Kampf um lange Haare, Klamotten und rauchen, hat einen schon nicht mehr interessiert. Heute haben Eltern andere Probleme mit ihren Kindern

items.text:
🚨🎬 Producers / Directors – Feature Film Project 🎬🚨
During COVID I read 2,000+ scripts for the Black List and Austin Film Festival.

Only seven stood out. One never left me.

🎬 Potential Lionsgate theatrical distribution attached through my mentor (6% residual participation) if the film remains substantially faithful to the script (~80%) and preserves the integrity of the protagonist.

Story:

A troubled biracial teenage girl falls obsessively in love with a white parolee trying not to return to prison.

Her devotion both saves him and destroys him, making her both the protagonist and antagonist.

Tone: Silver Linings Playbook × Precious

⚖️ The writer is currently incarcerated in an Oregon penitentiary for a crime he claims he didn’t commit.

🎬 Serious producers/directors interested in a strong festival and theatrical drama — DM me.

items.summary:
🚨🎬 Producers / Directors – Feature Film Project 🎬🚨
During COVID I read 2,000+ scripts for the Black List and Austin Film Festival.

Only seven stood out. One never left me.

🎬 Potential Lionsgate theatrical distribution attached through my mentor (6% residual participation) if the film remains substantially faithful to the script (~80%) and preserves the integrity of the protagonist.

Story:

A troubled biracial teenage girl falls obsessively in love with a white parolee trying not to return to prison.

Her devotion both saves him and destroys him, making her both the protagonist and antagonist.

Tone: Silver Linings Playbook × Precious

⚖️ The writer is currently incarcerated in an Oregon penitentiary for a crime he claims he didn’t commit.

🎬 Serious producers/directors interested in a strong festival and theatrical drama — DM me.
items.title: 🚨🎬 Producers / Directors – Feature Film Project 🎬🚨

items.text:
CASTING CALL – MALE MODELS / ACTORS (LOS ANGELES)
Casting 18–30 year old male models or actors for a fashion/editorial photoshoot taking place in Los Angeles on April 26. It is a paid opportunity.

Project details:

• Editorial-style fashion shoot inspired by athletic / collegiate themes  

• Locker room / sports environment aesthetic  

• Models must be comfortable posing in athletic wear (football uniforms, gym attire, etc.)  

• Some scenes may include close interaction between male models

Shoot info:

• Date: April 26  

• Location: Los Angeles area (exact location provided upon booking)  

• Duration: Approximately 3–4 hours  

• This is a creative editorial project with an experienced photographer and creative team

For more inquiries please message me.

items.text:
Looking for an older man (60–80) for a quick spec ad shoot today in Brooklyn 🎥
I’m a Brooklyn-based cinematographer working on a short spec commercial and need someone who can play an older gentleman reading a newspaper on a park bench. The vibe is calm, cinematic, and natural — think quiet morning in the park.

Details:

• Brooklyn location (park setting)  

• Very small crew  

• Simple scene (sitting on a bench, reading newspaper)  

• Shoot time: ~1–2 hours  

• Today  

• Non-union / spec project  

No acting experience required — just looking for someone with a great character look.

If interested, please DM me with a photo and availability today 📩

items.text:
📣 Casting Call!
Currently seeking background actors/extras for a well-known production company/label. The shoot (non-union, unpaid) will be in Los Angeles, 3/14, with copy, credit, & meals provided! 

Seeking: 
• 10 M or F, any race/ethnicity (21-60), to act as high-art enthusiasts, art gallery attendees (10-6 PM) 
•  5 M or F, any race/ethnicity to play as art gallery staff, or (2) waiters (10 - 6 PM) 
• 1 F, BIPOC performer, (20s), (~ 6-10 PM). 

Subject of your email: Short - 3/14 - [Position] - Name. 

Please email your resume, headshot, & position(s) interested in, to riannamamitag1@gmail.com !
